prerequisites.zh: 仅连接可销毁的 Redis 测试实例或快照副本，记录认证方式、ACL 用户、数据库编号和命令审计。
prerequisites.en: Connect only to a disposable Redis test instance or snapshot copy, recording authentication, ACL user, database number, and command auditing.

prerequisites.zh: 把 INFO、DBSIZE、限定前缀的 KEYS 与 FLUSHALL/FLUSHDB 分为只读和破坏性两组；破坏性命令只审查 ACL，不实际发送。
prerequisites.en: Separate INFO, DBSIZE, and prefix-limited KEYS from FLUSHALL and FLUSHDB as read-only and destructive groups; inspect ACLs for destructive commands without sending them.

analysis.zh: 阳性审计证据是未认证或不应具有权限的测试主体成功执行一个受控只读命令并由 Redis 审计确认，或 ACL 明确允许其调用危险命令。端口开放、RESP 文本被展示、`NOAUTH`/`NOPERM` 错误、扫描器猜测版本或仅看到命令名称都不是越权证据。
analysis.en: Positive audit evidence is an unauthenticated or underprivileged test principal successfully executing one controlled read-only command with Redis auditing confirmation, or ACL inspection explicitly showing access to a dangerous command. An open port, displayed RESP text, NOAUTH or NOPERM errors, a scanner's version guess, or merely seeing command names is not privilege evidence.

opsecTips.zh: 一个只读命令已证明 ACL 边界后停止，禁止发送 FLUSHALL、FLUSHDB 或全库通配 KEYS。
opsecTips.en: Stop after one read-only command establishes the ACL boundary; never send FLUSHALL, FLUSHDB, or a database-wide wildcard KEYS.

opsecTips.zh: 删除带唯一前缀的测试键，恢复原 ACL 和 protected-mode 配置，并销毁测试快照及命令审计令牌。
opsecTips.en: Delete uniquely prefixed test keys, restore the original ACL and protected-mode configuration, and destroy the test snapshot and command-audit token.

name.zh: Redis 命令审计：INFO 与 KEYS
name.en: Redis Command Audit: INFO and KEYS

description.zh: 用于核对 Redis 服务暴露、ACL 与危险命令边界的 RESP 命令参考；包含只读枚举和破坏性命令，归入工具命令而非认证 Payload。
description.en: A RESP command reference for reviewing Redis exposure, ACLs, and dangerous-command boundaries; it mixes read-only enumeration with destructive commands and belongs in tools.

overview.zh: 该记录实际是 Redis 命令目录，INFO、DBSIZE、KEYS 用于观察实例状态，而 FLUSHALL、FLUSHDB 会直接破坏数据，不能被描述为普通认证绕过载荷
overview.en: This record is a Redis command catalog: INFO, DBSIZE, and KEYS inspect state, while FLUSHALL and FLUSHDB are destructive and must not be presented as ordinary authentication payloads

vulnerability.zh: 真正的风险是 Redis 暴露在不可信网络、未启用认证或 ACL 过宽，使低权限连接可以枚举键空间甚至调用管理命令，而不是命令文本本身构成漏洞
vulnerability.en: The actual risk is an exposed Redis service with missing authentication or overbroad ACLs that let low-privilege clients enumerate keys or invoke administrative commands; the command text itself is not a vulnerability

exploitation.zh: 1. 在一次性测试实例中先用 INFO 与 DBSIZE 建立只读基线；2. 分别以未认证连接和受限 ACL 用户发送原命令集，但只执行获批的只读项并记录 NOPERM/NOAUTH；3. 将 KEYS、FLUSHALL、FLUSHDB 标记为禁止执行项，证据应是 ACL 决策和审计日志。若前置代理返回模拟响应或命中缓存，不能据此认定 Redis 权限缺陷。
exploitation.en: 1. Establish a read-only baseline with INFO and DBSIZE on a disposable instance. 2. Compare unauthenticated and restricted-ACL sessions using the original command catalog, executing only approved read-only entries and recording NOAUTH or NOPERM. 3. Mark KEYS, FLUSHALL, and FLUSHDB as non-executable review items; evidence is the ACL decision and audit log. Proxy-generated or cached responses are false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 仅在受信网络监听并启用 protected mode；2. 使用 ACL 最小化命令与键模式权限，显式禁用 FLUSHALL/FLUSHDB 等危险命令；3. 对认证失败、KEYS 与管理命令调用建立告警，并保留可恢复备份。
mitigation.en: 1. Bind Redis only to trusted networks and enable protected mode. 2. Apply least-privilege ACLs for commands and key patterns, explicitly denying dangerous commands such as FLUSHALL and FLUSHDB. 3. Alert on authentication failures, KEYS, and administrative commands, and maintain recoverable backups.

description.zh: 区分只读枚举、全量键扫描与破坏性管理命令，先确定哪些内容仅可审阅。
description.en: Separate read-only enumeration, full key scans, and destructive administration before deciding what may be executed.

description.zh: 在隔离实例中用未认证和受限用户对照原命令集，记录 NOAUTH、NOPERM 与允许结果。
description.en: Compare unauthenticated and restricted users against the original command catalog in an isolated instance, recording NOAUTH, NOPERM, and allowed results.

description.zh: 把安全查询保留为 Redis 工具命令，将破坏性项标记为仅供识别，避免出现在认证 Payload 树。
description.en: Keep safe queries as Redis tool commands and mark destructive entries as identification-only so they do not remain in the authentication payload tree.

review.rationale: 内容是 Redis 命令清单而非认证漏洞载荷，并且混入 FLUSHALL/FLUSHDB 等破坏性操作。

prerequisites.zh: 准备普通用户、管理员和未认证三类合成账户，并为同一受保护对象记录规范路径和方法的授权基线。
prerequisites.en: Prepare synthetic unauthenticated, regular-user, and administrator principals, and record the authorization baseline for the canonical path and method of the same protected object.

prerequisites.zh: 在代理、路由器和应用层关联原始路径、规范化路径、方法及最终主体，确保每个变体只改变一个元素。
prerequisites.en: Correlate raw path, normalized path, method, and final principal across proxy, router, and application layers, changing only one element per variant.

analysis.zh: 阳性是无权限主体通过某个路径、大小写、编码、尾部字符、方法或代理头变体访问了与规范 URL 相同的受保护对象，并且后端对象 ID 与审计主体一致。仅状态从 403 变为 404/200、返回登录页、空模板、缓存页面、重定向或代理未转发请求都是假阳性。
analysis.en: Positive evidence is an unauthorized principal accessing the same protected object as the canonical URL through one path, case, encoding, suffix, method, or proxy-header variant, with backend object ID and audit principal aligned. A status change from 403 to 404 or 200, a login page, empty template, cached page, redirect, or a request never forwarded by the proxy is a false positive.

opsecTips.zh: 首次读取一个无敏感字段的固定标记对象后停止，不继续调用写入、删除或管理员操作。
opsecTips.en: Stop after the first read of one fixed marker object without sensitive fields; do not continue to write, delete, or administrator operations.

opsecTips.zh: 删除测试对象和账户，清除代理/应用缓存与临时路由日志，并恢复统一路径规范化和服务端授权。
opsecTips.en: Delete test objects and accounts, clear proxy and application caches and temporary route logs, and restore consistent path normalization and server-side authorization.

name.zh: 401/403 访问控制绕过变体

description.zh: 通过路径规范化、方法覆盖与代理头变体验证前置代理和应用路由是否对同一受保护资源执行一致授权。
description.en: Tests whether reverse proxies and application routes enforce consistent authorization for the same protected resource across path, method, and header variants.

overview.zh: 401/403 绕过测试关注同一逻辑资源经过大小写、编码、尾随字符、方法覆盖或代理头处理后，是否落入未经授权保护的另一条路由
overview.en: 401/403 bypass testing asks whether case changes, encoding, trailing characters, method overrides, or proxy headers route the same logical resource around its authorization control

vulnerability.zh: 当 CDN、反向代理、框架路由器与业务授权层采用不同的路径解码和规范化顺序时，前层可能拒绝标准路径却把变体转发到未受保护的处理器
vulnerability.en: When a CDN, reverse proxy, framework router, and business authorization layer normalize paths in different orders, a variant may reach an unprotected handler even though the canonical path is denied

exploitation.zh: 1. 使用无权限账号请求标准受保护路径并保存 401/403、响应体摘要与路由日志；2. 逐类测试路径、方法和头部变体，每次只改变一个因素；3. 仅当变体返回真实受保护对象或完成受控动作，且后端日志显示同一资源时确认缺陷。自定义错误页、缓存的 200 页面或登录页内容相同均属于假阳性。
exploitation.en: 1. Request the canonical protected path with an unauthorized account and save the 401/403 response, body digest, and route log. 2. Test path, method, and header variants one factor at a time. 3. Confirm only when a variant returns the protected object or completes a controlled action and backend logs identify the same resource. Custom error pages, cached 200 responses, and login pages are false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 在授权前执行一次统一的路径解码与规范化并拒绝歧义路径；2. 由后端资源层实施默认拒绝授权，不信任客户端提供的重写头；3. 对代理和应用建立覆盖所有方法、编码及尾随字符的回归测试。
mitigation.en: 1. Decode and canonicalize paths once before authorization and reject ambiguous paths. 2. Enforce deny-by-default authorization at the backend resource layer and do not trust client-supplied rewrite headers. 3. Add proxy-to-application regression tests for methods, encodings, and trailing-character variants.

description.zh: 用无权限身份请求标准资源，固定状态码、响应摘要和后端路由标识。
description.en: Request the canonical resource without permission and record status, response digest, and backend route identity.

title.en: Test one variant at a time

description.zh: 按路径规范化、HTTP 方法和代理头分组提交原始变体，避免同时改变多个条件。
description.en: Submit the original variants grouped by path normalization, HTTP method, and proxy header without changing multiple factors at once.

description.zh: 对比资源内容和审计日志，只有实际读取或受控状态变化才能证明绕过。
description.en: Compare protected content and audit logs; only an actual read or controlled state change proves a bypass.

review.rationale: 这是访问控制规范化差异的测试载荷，属于认证与授权安全而不是通用 WAF 绕过。

prerequisites.zh: 使用两个权限不同的合成会话，列出 Cookie、URL、请求体和网关注入字段的会话来源及优先级。
prerequisites.en: Use two synthetic sessions with different privileges and enumerate session sources and precedence across cookies, URLs, request bodies, and gateway-injected fields.

prerequisites.zh: 在各解析层记录原始值、类型转换、重复参数顺序和最终 session ID，准备来源一致与来源冲突的配对请求。
prerequisites.en: Record raw values, type coercion, duplicate-parameter order, and final session ID at every parser, preparing matched requests with consistent and conflicting sources.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求低权限请求中的次要来源或结构化值覆盖可信 Cookie，并让服务器实际载入另一个合成会话或管理员标记，审计可追溯其解析路径。仅字符串等于 admin、JSON 被接受、类型报错、前端显示角色、重复参数顺序变化但最终主体不变都不是会话混淆。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires a secondary source or structured value in a low-privilege request to override the trusted cookie and make the server load another synthetic session or administrator marker, with an auditable parsing path. A string equal to admin, accepted JSON, type errors, a role displayed only by the client, or duplicate-order changes without a principal change is not session confusion.

opsecTips.zh: 一个来源冲突已导致合成主体变化后停止，不访问该主体的业务数据或执行状态变更。
opsecTips.en: Stop after one source conflict changes the synthetic principal; do not access that principal's business data or perform state changes.

opsecTips.zh: 注销并删除全部合成会话，清除网关覆盖字段和解析调试日志，再恢复唯一 Cookie 来源与严格类型 schema。
opsecTips.en: Revoke and delete all synthetic sessions, clear gateway override fields and parser debug logs, and restore a single cookie source with a strict type schema.

name.zh: 会话状态混淆

description.zh: 验证多个会话来源、重复参数或结构化会话值是否被不同组件以不一致方式解释，从而产生身份状态混淆。
description.en: Tests whether multiple session sources, duplicate parameters, or structured session values are interpreted inconsistently and create identity-state confusion.

overview.zh: 会话状态混淆不是把 session 参数简单改成 admin，而是检查 Cookie、URL、请求体、网关和应用之间是否存在优先级冲突或类型强制转换
overview.en: Session state confusion is not merely changing a session parameter to admin; it examines precedence conflicts and type coercion across cookies, URLs, request bodies, gateways, and applications

vulnerability.zh: 如果网关校验一个会话值而后端读取另一个来源，或后端把布尔值、对象和字符串转换成同一真值，攻击者可能绕过会话完整性与身份绑定
vulnerability.en: If a gateway validates one session value while the backend reads another source, or if booleans, objects, and strings collapse to the same truthy value, session integrity and identity binding can fail

exploitation.zh: 1. 以两个权限不同的测试账号记录正常 Cookie、URL 参数和请求体中的会话来源；2. 逐一提交原始 session 变体，并用重复参数构造来源冲突；3. 对比最终用户标识、服务端会话 ID 与审计日志。只有身份实际切换或授权结果改变才成立；被统一重定向到登录页或仅返回格式错误属于假阳性。
exploitation.en: 1. Record normal session sources in cookies, URLs, and bodies for two test accounts with different privileges. 2. Submit the original session variants and create source conflicts with duplicate parameters. 3. Compare the final user identity, server-side session ID, and audit log. Only an identity or authorization change confirms the issue; a common login redirect or parse error is a false positive.

mitigation.zh: 1. 会话标识只从单一受信通道读取并拒绝重复来源；2. 对会话值实施严格类型、长度和格式校验，登录后轮换 ID；3. 将会话与服务端用户记录绑定，并对来源冲突和身份切换记录告警。
mitigation.en: 1. Read session identifiers from one trusted channel and reject duplicate sources. 2. Enforce strict type, length, and format validation and rotate the ID after authentication. 3. Bind sessions to server-side user records and alert on source conflicts or identity changes.

description.zh: 记录网关和应用分别从 Cookie、URL 或请求体读取的会话值及优先级。
description.en: Record which session value the gateway and application read from cookies, URLs, or bodies and in what order.

description.zh: 提交原始结构化 session 变体与重复参数，保持账号和目标资源不变。
description.en: Submit the original structured session variants and duplicate parameters while keeping the account and resource constant.

description.zh: 在响应、服务端会话存储和审计日志中确认最终身份，排除仅解析失败的情况。
description.en: Confirm the resolved identity in the response, server-side session store, and audit log, excluding simple parse failures.

review.rationale: 内容用于验证会话来源和类型解析差异，保留为认证 Payload，但需从泛化名称改为明确的状态混淆测试。

prerequisites.zh: 确认用户可控 URL 最终进入链接、重定向、iframe 或其他可导航浏览器上下文，并记录 CSP、sandbox 和 scheme 过滤。
prerequisites.en: Confirm that a user-controlled URL reaches a link, redirect, iframe, or another navigable browser context, recording CSP, sandbox, and scheme filtering.

prerequisites.zh: 在隔离浏览器配置文件中使用只写入页面内 canary 的无网络 HTML，准备同位置的 https 与纯文本 data URI 对照。
prerequisites.en: Use network-free HTML that writes only an in-page canary in an isolated browser profile, with HTTPS and plain-text data-URI controls in the same sink.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据是应用保留 data scheme，真实浏览器导航到 HTML 媒体类型并在目标上下文执行固定 canary，且控制台或 DOM 记录可关联。字符串出现在数据库/响应体、浏览器把它下载为文本、CSP 阻止执行、链接未被点击或扫描器只识别 `data:` 都是假阳性。
analysis.en: Positive evidence is the application preserving the data scheme, a real browser navigating to an HTML media type, and the fixed canary executing in the intended context with correlated console or DOM evidence. A string in storage or the response body, download as text, CSP blocking execution, an unclicked link, or a scanner merely recognizing data: is a false positive.

opsecTips.zh: 固定 DOM canary 首次执行后停止，不加入 Cookie 读取、网络请求或持久化脚本。
opsecTips.en: Stop after the fixed DOM canary executes once; do not add cookie reads, network requests, or persistent script.

opsecTips.zh: 删除测试内容和浏览器配置文件，清除历史记录、缓存及 Service Worker，并恢复 URL scheme 白名单与 CSP。
opsecTips.en: Delete test content and the browser profile, clear history, caches, and service workers, and restore the URL-scheme allowlist and CSP.

name.zh: data: URI 注入

description.zh: 验证应用是否把不可信 URL 直接放入可导航或可执行上下文，使 data: URI 承载的 HTML 或脚本在浏览器中运行。
description.en: Tests whether untrusted URLs reach navigable or executable browser contexts where HTML or script carried by a data URI can run.

overview.zh: data: URI 可以把媒体类型和内容直接嵌入 URL；只有当应用把该值送入链接、重定向、iframe 或其他可导航上下文时，它才形成 XSS 或内容注入风险
overview.en: A data URI embeds a media type and content directly in a URL; it becomes an XSS or content-injection risk only when the application places it in a link, redirect, iframe, or another navigable context

vulnerability.zh: 漏洞来自仅校验字符串前缀或域名而未解析 URI scheme、媒体类型与最终浏览器上下文，导致 data:text/html 等内容绕过 http/https 白名单
vulnerability.en: The flaw arises when validation checks only prefixes or host strings without parsing the URI scheme, media type, and final browser context, allowing data:text/html content around an intended HTTP or HTTPS allowlist

exploitation.zh: 1. 找到接受 URL 并在浏览器中导航或渲染的位置，先用普通 HTTPS 地址建立行为基线；2. 依次提交原始 data: 变体并观察最终 DOM、地址栏、CSP 报告和脚本执行标记；3. 在不同浏览器与沙箱属性下复测。仅被当作文本显示、强制下载或由 CSP 阻止时不能判定可利用 XSS。
exploitation.en: 1. Find a URL input that is navigated or rendered and establish a baseline with a normal HTTPS URL. 2. Submit the original data URI variants and inspect the final DOM, address bar, CSP reports, and a harmless execution marker. 3. Retest across browsers and sandbox attributes. Rendering as text, forcing a download, or CSP blocking execution does not prove exploitable XSS.

mitigation.zh: 1. 解析并仅允许明确需要的 http/https scheme；2. 对输出上下文执行正确编码，并对链接、iframe 与重定向分别使用安全 API；3. 配置 CSP 禁止不必要的 data: 脚本和框架来源，并增加浏览器回归测试。
mitigation.en: 1. Parse URLs and allow only explicitly required HTTP and HTTPS schemes. 2. Apply context-appropriate output encoding and safe APIs for links, iframes, and redirects. 3. Configure CSP to disallow unnecessary data sources for scripts and frames and add browser regression tests.

description.zh: 定位输入值最终进入 href、src、重定向或 iframe 的具体 DOM/HTTP 位置。
description.en: Locate the exact DOM or HTTP position where the value enters href, src, redirect, or iframe navigation.

description.zh: 使用原始 data: URI 集合并记录媒体类型解析、DOM 结果与无害脚本标记。
description.en: Use the original data URI set and record media-type parsing, DOM outcome, and a harmless script marker.

attackChain.payload:
data:
data:,
data:text/html,
data:text/html,<script>
data:text/html;base64,

description.zh: 对比 URL 白名单、CSP 和 sandbox 的阻断结果，区分内容展示与代码执行。
description.en: Compare URL allowlist, CSP, and sandbox enforcement to distinguish content display from code execution.

review.rationale: 该记录描述危险 URI scheme 在浏览器上下文中的执行，应从认证漏洞改归 XSS。

prerequisites.zh: 使用可回滚的合成账户和无价值状态变更端点，确认浏览器 Cookie 的 SameSite、Secure 与域属性。
prerequisites.en: Use a reversible synthetic account and a valueless state-changing endpoint, confirming the browser cookie's SameSite, Secure, and domain attributes.

prerequisites.zh: 从不同站点托管最小资源标签页面，并在服务端记录 Origin/Referer、会话主体和变更前后的固定 canary 状态。
prerequisites.en: Host a minimal resource-tag page on a different site and record Origin or Referer, session principal, and fixed canary state before and after on the server.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求受害测试浏览器在未交互授权的情况下携带会话发出跨站 GET，服务器据此改变了合成 canary 状态，且审计显示该主体和请求来源。资源标签产生请求但 Cookie 未发送、响应被 CORS 阻止、返回 200 而状态未变、图片加载失败或用户主动确认操作都不是 CSRF。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires the test victim browser to send a cross-site GET with its session without interaction and the server to change synthetic canary state, with auditing identifying the principal and source. A resource request without cookies, CORS blocking response reads, HTTP 200 without state change, a broken image, or an explicitly confirmed action is not CSRF.

opsecTips.zh: 一个可逆 canary 状态首次被跨站请求改变后停止，不测试转账、删号或提权等真实动作。
opsecTips.en: Stop after one reversible canary state is changed by the cross-site request; do not test real transfers, account deletion, or privilege elevation.

opsecTips.zh: 回滚 canary 状态，注销测试会话，删除跨站页面和浏览器数据，并恢复 POST、CSRF token 与 SameSite 控制。
opsecTips.en: Roll back canary state, revoke the test session, delete the cross-site page and browser data, and restore POST, CSRF-token, and SameSite controls.

name.zh: 基于 GET 的 CSRF 资源标签触发

description.zh: 使用 img、script、link 等自动请求标签验证具有副作用的 GET 端点是否缺少 CSRF 防护。
description.en: Uses automatically requested resource tags such as img, script, and link to test whether state-changing GET endpoints lack CSRF protection.

overview.zh: 浏览器加载图片、脚本和样式时会自动发起 GET 请求并在适用条件下携带 Cookie；若服务端把 GET 用于转账、删除或提权，恶意页面即可跨站触发
overview.en: Browsers automatically issue GET requests for images, scripts, and styles and may attach cookies; if the server uses GET for transfers, deletion, or privilege changes, a malicious page can trigger the action cross-site

vulnerability.zh: 根因是违反 HTTP 安全方法语义并把身份 Cookie 当作唯一授权证据，同时缺少 CSRF token、Origin/Referer 校验或 SameSite 限制
vulnerability.en: The root cause is using a safe HTTP method for state changes and treating the identity cookie as the only authorization evidence without a CSRF token, Origin or Referer validation, or suitable SameSite policy

exploitation.zh: 1. 使用测试账号直接访问目标 GET 端点，确认它确实产生可回滚状态变化；2. 在另一个站点加载原始 img/script/link 载荷并记录请求 Cookie、Origin/Referer 与前后状态；3. 更换无会话浏览器和幂等资源复测。只有跨站请求携带受害会话并导致状态改变才成立，图片加载错误或单纯命中端点是典型假阳性。
exploitation.en: 1. Call the target GET endpoint directly with a test account and confirm a reversible state change. 2. Load the original img, script, and link payloads from another origin and record cookies, Origin or Referer, and before-and-after state. 3. Retest without a session and against an idempotent resource. The issue exists only when a cross-site request carries the victim session and changes state; a resource-load error or endpoint hit alone is a false positive.

mitigation.zh: 1. 所有状态变更改用 POST/PUT/PATCH/DELETE 并验证 CSRF token；2. 对 Cookie 设置合适 SameSite、Secure 与 HttpOnly 属性；3. 校验 Origin/Referer，禁止通过 GET 产生副作用并为关键操作增加二次确认。
mitigation.en: 1. Move all state changes to POST, PUT, PATCH, or DELETE and validate a CSRF token. 2. Set appropriate SameSite, Secure, and HttpOnly cookie attributes. 3. Validate Origin or Referer, prohibit side effects on GET, and require confirmation for sensitive actions.

description.zh: 用测试账号调用端点并记录可回滚的业务状态变化。
description.en: Call the endpoint with a test account and record a reversible business-state change.

description.zh: 在不同源页面嵌入原始标签载荷，捕获请求头、Cookie 与响应。
description.en: Embed the original tag payloads on another origin and capture headers, cookies, and response.

description.zh: 将状态变化与受害会话、审计日志关联，排除无会话请求和仅加载失败。
description.en: Correlate the state change with the victim session and audit log, excluding unauthenticated requests and simple load failures.

review.rationale: 内容是典型 GET 型 CSRF，应从认证分类迁入 CSRF 并补充状态变化证据标准。

prerequisites.zh: 使用测试签发方、受众和低权限账户生成一枚有效签名基线 JWT，并固定资源服务器的算法白名单。
prerequisites.en: Generate a valid signed baseline JWT from a test issuer, audience, and low-privilege account, and pin the resource server's algorithm allowlist.

prerequisites.zh: 仅把 Header 的 alg 改为 none 及大小写变体，保留相同无敏感 claims，并采集解析、签名和授权三阶段日志。
prerequisites.en: Change only the header alg to none and case variants while retaining the same nonsensitive claims, and collect parser, signature, and authorization-stage logs.

analysis.zh: 阳性是无签名 token 越过签名校验并以测试主体访问了需要认证的固定资源，日志明确显示 alg=none 被接受。仅解析成功、错误信息变化、token 内容被 UI 解码、返回匿名 200、或网关转发后资源服务器拒绝都不是 none 算法漏洞。
analysis.en: Positive evidence is an unsigned token passing signature validation and accessing a fixed authenticated resource as the test principal, with logs explicitly showing alg=none acceptance. Successful parsing, changed error text, client-side token decoding, anonymous HTTP 200, or gateway forwarding followed by resource-server rejection is not a none-algorithm vulnerability.

opsecTips.zh: 一个无签名 token 首次通过固定只读资源后停止，不添加管理员 claims 或调用写接口。
opsecTips.en: Stop after one unsigned token reaches the fixed read-only resource; do not add administrator claims or invoke write endpoints.

opsecTips.zh: 撤销测试 token 与会话，清除认证缓存和解析日志，并恢复服务端算法固定及签名必需配置。
opsecTips.en: Revoke test tokens and sessions, clear authentication caches and parser logs, and restore server-side algorithm pinning and mandatory signature validation.

name.zh: JWT none 算法拒绝测试

description.zh: 验证 JWT 验证器是否严格拒绝 alg=none 及其大小写变体，并确保空签名令牌不能进入授权逻辑。
description.en: Verifies that a JWT validator rejects alg=none and case variants and never lets an unsigned token reach authorization logic.

overview.zh: none 算法测试用于确认服务端是否把 JWT Header 中的 alg 当作可信配置；安全实现必须从服务端策略选择算法并拒绝所有未签名令牌
overview.en: The none-algorithm test checks whether the server trusts the JWT alg header as configuration; a secure implementation selects algorithms from server policy and rejects every unsigned token

vulnerability.zh: 受影响实现会接受 alg=none、忽略签名段或在算法解析大小写异常时走到无签名分支，使攻击者可以修改 claims 后伪造身份
vulnerability.en: A vulnerable implementation accepts alg=none, ignores the signature segment, or reaches an unsigned path through case-handling errors, allowing modified claims to impersonate another identity

exploitation.zh: 1. 获取测试账号的有效签名令牌并记录受保护接口基线；2. 保持 payload claims 不变，依次提交原始 none 大小写变体和空签名格式；3. 再修改一个无害声明并核对服务端主体与授权日志。只有未签名令牌获得受保护数据才确认漏洞；统一 200 错误包装或公开接口响应属于假阳性。
exploitation.en: 1. Obtain a valid signed token for a test account and record a protected-endpoint baseline. 2. Keep claims unchanged while submitting the original none case variants and empty-signature forms. 3. Change one harmless claim and verify the server principal and authorization log. Confirm only if an unsigned token receives protected data; uniform HTTP 200 error envelopes or public endpoints are false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 在服务端固定允许算法列表并显式拒绝 none；2. 使用维护中的 JWT 库，验证签名后再读取授权声明；3. 为算法大小写、空签名和畸形段建立负向测试及认证失败告警。
mitigation.en: 1. Pin an allowlist of algorithms on the server and explicitly reject none. 2. Use a maintained JWT library and verify the signature before consuming authorization claims. 3. Add negative tests for algorithm case, empty signatures, and malformed segments and alert on validation failures.

description.zh: 用低权限测试账号确认有效签名令牌可访问的最小资源范围。
description.en: Confirm the minimum resource scope available to a valid signed token for a low-privilege test account.

description.zh: 发送原始未签名令牌集合并记录验证器错误、主体解析和响应摘要。
description.en: Send the original unsigned-token set and record validator errors, resolved principal, and response digest.

description.zh: 仅在修改后的未签名声明影响真实授权结果时确认，并关联服务端日志。
description.en: Confirm only when modified unsigned claims affect a real authorization result and correlate that result with server logs.

review.rationale: 属于 JWT 算法与签名验证缺陷，需从通用认证分类迁到 JWT 安全。

prerequisites.zh: 建立只包含两个注册 key ID 的测试 JWKS/密钥库，并记录 kid 到本地文件、数据库或远程键的实际映射路径。
prerequisites.en: Create a test JWKS or keystore with only two registered key IDs and record the actual mapping from kid to local file, database, or remote key.

prerequisites.zh: 为路径穿越、特殊值和未知 ID 使用无效签名与合法签名配对，开启文件访问、查询参数和密钥选择审计。
prerequisites.en: Pair invalid and valid signatures for traversal, special-value, and unknown-ID cases, enabling file-access, query-parameter, and key-selection auditing.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求攻击者控制的 kid 改变了验证密钥来源，并使原本无效的测试签名通过，文件/数据库/JWKS 审计能够证明选择链。仅出现文件不存在、SQL 错误、未知 key、HTTP 获取失败、kid 被记录或 token 被解析都不构成密钥选择注入。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires an attacker-controlled kid to alter the verification-key source and make an otherwise invalid test signature pass, with file, database, or JWKS auditing proving the selection chain. File-not-found, SQL errors, unknown-key responses, failed HTTP fetches, logged kid values, or token parsing alone do not establish key-selection injection.

opsecTips.zh: 一个注册测试密钥被越界选中后停止，不读取系统文件、查询真实密钥表或访问外部 JWKS。
opsecTips.en: Stop after one registered test key is selected outside its intended mapping; do not read system files, query real key tables, or access external JWKS endpoints.

opsecTips.zh: 删除临时密钥和 JWKS，清除密钥缓存及访问审计，并恢复 kid 精确映射、路径隔离和查询参数化。
opsecTips.en: Delete temporary keys and JWKS data, clear key caches and access audits, and restore exact kid mapping, path isolation, and parameterized lookup.

name.zh: JWT kid 密钥选择注入

description.zh: 验证服务端是否将 kid 直接用于文件路径、数据库查询或远程密钥选择，从而允许攻击者控制验证密钥。
description.en: Tests whether the server uses kid directly in file paths, database queries, or remote key selection and thereby lets an attacker influence the verification key.

overview.zh: kid 是 JWT Header 中的密钥标识符，本应只映射到服务端预注册密钥；该测试覆盖目录穿越、特殊值和密钥查找边界，而不是把任意字符串视为有效密钥
overview.en: The JWT kid header should map only to a server-registered key; this test covers traversal, special values, and key-lookup boundaries rather than treating arbitrary strings as valid keys

vulnerability.zh: 如果应用把 kid 拼接到文件路径、SQL 或缓存键中，攻击者可选择可预测内容作为 HMAC 密钥，或触发密钥查询注入和越界读取
vulnerability.en: If an application concatenates kid into a file path, SQL query, or cache key, an attacker may select predictable content as an HMAC key or trigger injection and out-of-bounds key reads

exploitation.zh: 1. 使用两个合法 kid 的测试令牌确认服务端密钥轮换基线；2. 提交原始目录穿越和异常 kid 变体，同时保持算法与 claims 不变；3. 观察密钥查找日志、错误类型及授权结果，并用不存在 kid 对照。文件不存在、统一签名失败或仅错误差异不能证明密钥被控制。
exploitation.en: 1. Use test tokens with two legitimate kid values to establish key-rotation behavior. 2. Submit the original traversal and malformed kid variants while keeping algorithm and claims unchanged. 3. Inspect key-lookup logs, error types, and authorization results, with a nonexistent kid as control. Missing-file errors, uniform signature failures, or error differences alone do not prove key control.

mitigation.zh: 1. 将 kid 与固定密钥表做精确映射，不参与路径或查询拼接；2. 限制字符集、长度并拒绝未知 kid；3. 对密钥加载实施最小文件权限、参数化查询和审计，并添加目录穿越负向测试。
mitigation.en: 1. Map kid exactly to a fixed server-side key registry and never concatenate it into paths or queries. 2. Restrict character set and length and reject unknown identifiers. 3. Apply least filesystem privilege, parameterized lookup, and auditing to key loading and add traversal-negative tests.

title.zh: 建立合法 kid 对照

description.zh: 用预注册的两个密钥标识符确认正常选择与轮换行为。
description.en: Confirm normal selection and rotation behavior with two registered key identifiers.

description.zh: 提交原始 kid 变体并捕获密钥查找、文件访问或查询日志。
description.en: Submit the original kid variants and capture key lookup, file access, or query logs.

description.zh: 只有攻击者选择的密钥成功验证篡改令牌时才确认，错误信息差异不够。
description.en: Confirm only if an attacker-selected key validates a modified token; error-message differences are insufficient.

review.rationale: 该记录专门验证 JWT 密钥选择器注入，分类应为 JWT 安全。

prerequisites.zh: 为低权限合成用户签发有效 JWT，并准备一个只读管理员 canary 端点以区分 claims 展示与服务端授权。
prerequisites.en: Issue a valid JWT for a low-privilege synthetic user and prepare a read-only administrator canary endpoint to distinguish claim display from server-side authorization.

prerequisites.zh: 只修改 role、is_admin 或 permissions claim 并移除/破坏签名，记录签名验证结果、最终主体和授权决策。
prerequisites.en: Modify only role, is_admin, or permissions claims while removing or corrupting the signature, recording signature results, final principal, and authorization decision.

analysis.zh: 阳性是被篡改且无有效签名的权限 claim 被服务器信任，使低权限主体读取管理员 canary，审计显示授权直接采用该 claim。前端菜单变为管理员、Base64URL 解码显示 admin、返回 401/403、仅登录成功或原账户本就有权限都属于假阳性。
analysis.en: Positive evidence is a tampered privilege claim without a valid signature being trusted by the server so the low-privilege principal can read the administrator canary, with auditing showing authorization derived from that claim. An administrator menu in the client, Base64URL decoding that displays admin, HTTP 401 or 403, ordinary login success, or an account already entitled to the resource is a false positive.

opsecTips.zh: 管理员 canary 首次被无效签名 token 读取后停止，不尝试修改角色、账户或业务数据。
opsecTips.en: Stop after the administrator canary is first read with an invalidly signed token; do not modify roles, accounts, or business data.

opsecTips.zh: 撤销合成账户和全部测试 JWT，清除 claims/授权缓存与审计标记，并恢复签名先于授权的校验顺序。
opsecTips.en: Revoke the synthetic account and all test JWTs, clear claim and authorization caches and audit markers, and restore signature validation before authorization.

name.zh: JWT 未签名权限声明篡改

description.zh: 验证修改 role、is_admin、permissions 等声明后，服务端是否在缺少有效签名的情况下信任这些权限字段。
description.en: Tests whether the server trusts modified role, is_admin, or permissions claims when the token lacks a valid signature.

overview.zh: JWT claims 只是被签名保护的数据，并不因为 Base64URL 编码而可信；该条聚焦权限声明篡改与签名验证顺序，而不是声明名称本身
overview.en: JWT claims are data protected by a signature and are not trusted merely because they are Base64URL encoded; this entry focuses on privilege-claim tampering and validation order

vulnerability.zh: 服务端若先依据 role 或 is_admin 做授权，再验证签名，或把空签名与解析成功混为一谈，就会允许客户端自授予管理员权限
vulnerability.en: If the server authorizes on role or is_admin before verifying the signature, or conflates successful parsing with successful validation, a client can grant itself administrative privileges

exploitation.zh: 1. 用低权限账号令牌访问管理员接口并记录拒绝基线；2. 提交原始 role/admin 声明变体但保留空签名，逐次只改变一个声明；3. 核对服务端主体、权限计算和审计事件。只有受保护操作被允许才算成功；前端菜单变化、解码页面显示 admin 或公开接口 200 都是假阳性。
exploitation.en: 1. Access an administrative endpoint with a low-privilege token and record the denied baseline. 2. Submit the original role and admin claim variants with an empty signature, changing one claim at a time. 3. Verify the server principal, permission calculation, and audit event. Only an allowed protected operation confirms the flaw; UI menu changes, a decoder showing admin, or a public 200 response are false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 在任何 claims 使用前完成签名、算法、issuer、audience 与时效验证；2. 高价值权限从服务端数据库读取，不直接信任客户端 role；3. 对声明篡改、空签名和权限提升建立自动化负向测试。
mitigation.en: 1. Validate signature, algorithm, issuer, audience, and time constraints before using any claims. 2. Read high-value permissions from server-side state instead of trusting client role claims. 3. Add automated negative tests for claim tampering, empty signatures, and privilege escalation.

description.zh: 使用原始低权限令牌请求管理员接口，确认服务端拒绝受保护操作并记录响应基线。
description.en: Confirm that the original low-privilege token cannot perform an administrative action.

description.zh: 使用原始令牌变体依次更改 role、is_admin 或 permissions，保持其他字段不变。
description.en: Use the original token variants to change role, is_admin, or permissions one at a time while preserving other fields.

description.zh: 通过受保护资源和审计日志验证是否真实提权，忽略仅客户端显示变化。
description.en: Use the protected resource and audit log to verify actual escalation, ignoring client-only display changes.

review.rationale: 原名称把 HS256 Header 与空签名混在一起；覆盖明确为未签名权限声明完整性测试并归入 JWT。

prerequisites.zh: 确认服务设计只接受 RS/ES 等非对称算法，并使用专用测试 RSA 公私钥与低权限 claims。
prerequisites.en: Confirm that the service is designed to accept only an asymmetric algorithm such as RS or ES, using a dedicated test RSA key pair and low-privilege claims.

prerequisites.zh: 以公开测试公钥字节作为 HMAC secret 生成对照 token，同时固定 issuer、audience、kid 与资源端算法配置。
prerequisites.en: Generate the comparison token using the public test-key bytes as an HMAC secret while fixing issuer, audience, kid, and resource-server algorithm configuration.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求预期仅验证 RSA 的服务接受以公钥作为 HMAC secret 签出的 token，并让合成主体通过受保护只读端点，验证日志显示从客户端 alg 选择了 HMAC 分支。算法不支持、签名失败、公开密钥可下载、token 可解析或使用真正共享密钥的合法 HS256 服务均是假阳性。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires a service intended to verify only RSA to accept a token HMAC-signed with the public-key bytes and authorize the synthetic principal at a protected read-only endpoint, with validation logs showing the client alg selected the HMAC branch. Unsupported algorithms, signature failure, a downloadable public key, token parsing, or a legitimate HS256 service using a real shared secret are false positives.

opsecTips.zh: 一个混淆 token 通过只读 canary 后停止，不提升 claims 或针对其他租户、kid 和真实公钥重放。
opsecTips.en: Stop after one confused token passes the read-only canary; do not elevate claims or replay against other tenants, key IDs, or production public keys.

opsecTips.zh: 轮换并删除测试密钥，撤销 token，清除 JWKS/验证缓存和诊断日志，并恢复算法与密钥类型严格绑定。
opsecTips.en: Rotate and delete test keys, revoke tokens, clear JWKS and validation caches and diagnostic logs, and restore strict binding between algorithm and key type.

name.zh: JWT RSA/HMAC 算法混淆

description.zh: 验证使用非对称算法的服务是否错误接受 HMAC 令牌，并把公开 RSA 公钥当作共享密钥。
description.en: Tests whether a service intended to use asymmetric signatures mistakenly accepts HMAC tokens and treats an RSA public key as a shared secret.

overview.zh: RSA/HMAC 混淆发生在验证器根据客户端 alg 选择验证分支，却向不同算法复用同一 key 参数；公开公钥因此可能被误作 HMAC 密钥
overview.en: RSA/HMAC confusion occurs when a verifier chooses its branch from the client-controlled alg header while reusing one key parameter across algorithms, allowing a public key to be misused as an HMAC secret

vulnerability.zh: 受影响代码未固定预期算法，也未区分非对称公钥与对称密钥类型，使攻击者可把 RS256 令牌改成 HS256 并用公开材料重新签名
vulnerability.en: Vulnerable code fails to pin the expected algorithm or distinguish asymmetric public keys from symmetric secrets, letting an attacker change RS256 to HS256 and sign with public material

exploitation.zh: 1. 取得测试环境的合法 RS256 令牌与对应公开公钥，确认 RS256 基线；2. 使用原始 RSA/HMAC 变体构造 HS256 对照并保持 claims 不变；3. 再改变一个低风险声明，核对验证库日志与授权结果。仅算法名称出现在错误信息中不是漏洞，必须证明 HMAC 令牌被接受并影响受保护资源。
exploitation.en: 1. Obtain a valid RS256 test token and its public key and confirm the RS256 baseline. 2. Use the original RSA/HMAC variants to build an HS256 control while preserving claims. 3. Change one low-risk claim and verify library logs and authorization results. Seeing an algorithm name in an error is not a flaw; the HMAC token must be accepted and affect a protected resource.

mitigation.zh: 1. 在验证调用中固定 RS256/ES256 等预期算法；2. 为对称和非对称密钥使用不同类型与存储，禁止跨算法复用；3. 升级 JWT 库并添加 RS→HS、未知算法和错误密钥类型测试。
mitigation.en: 1. Pin the expected RS256, ES256, or other algorithm in the verification call. 2. Use distinct types and stores for symmetric and asymmetric keys and forbid cross-algorithm reuse. 3. Upgrade the JWT library and test RS-to-HS changes, unknown algorithms, and wrong key types.

description.zh: 记录有效 RS256 令牌、公开公钥指纹与服务端算法配置。
description.en: Record a valid RS256 token, the public-key fingerprint, and server algorithm configuration.

description.zh: 提交原始算法变体，使用公开测试材料生成可比较的 HS256 令牌。
description.en: Submit the original algorithm variants and use public test material to create a comparable HS256 token.

description.zh: 从验证日志和受保护响应证明服务端是否错误进入 HMAC 分支。
description.en: Use validation logs and a protected response to prove whether the server incorrectly entered the HMAC branch.

review.rationale: 属于 JWT 验证算法混淆，分类与教程必须围绕算法固定和密钥类型。

prerequisites.zh: 把 Redis CONFIG/SAVE 工具操作与 Web 可执行文件条件分开审批，只使用隔离 Redis、临时 Web 根和无外网解释器。
prerequisites.en: Approve Redis CONFIG and SAVE mechanics separately from web-executable-file conditions, using only isolated Redis, a temporary web root, and an interpreter without network access.

prerequisites.zh: 确认 Redis 服务账户对临时目录的写权限、RDB 文件格式及 Web 映射，并以固定无输入 canary 替代命令执行。
prerequisites.en: Confirm Redis service-account write access, RDB file format, and web mapping for the temporary directory, replacing command execution with a fixed input-free canary.

analysis.zh: 拆分后的阳性证据要求工具侧审计显示 CONFIG 与 SAVE 确实写入临时路径，同时 Web 侧只执行固定 canary 并可由文件、进程和请求日志关联。Redis 中存在 PHP 字符串、SAVE 成功、文件不可解析、静态下载、HTTP 500 或模型声称生成 shell 都不能证明 WebShell/RCE。
analysis.en: Positive evidence after splitting requires tool-side auditing to show CONFIG and SAVE writing the temporary path, while the web side executes only a fixed canary correlated through file, process, and request logs. A PHP string in Redis, successful SAVE, an unparsable file, static download, HTTP 500, or a model claiming a shell was generated does not prove a webshell or RCE.

opsecTips.zh: 无输入 canary 首次从临时 Web 路径执行后停止，禁止使用语料中的 eval/system/shell_exec 入口或传递命令参数。
opsecTips.en: Stop after the input-free canary executes once from the temporary web path; do not use the corpus's eval, system, or shell_exec entry points or pass command arguments.

opsecTips.zh: 恢复 Redis dir/dbfilename，删除测试键、RDB 与临时 Web 根，重启隔离解释器并撤销 Redis 服务账户写权限。
opsecTips.en: Restore Redis dir and dbfilename, delete test keys, RDB files, and the temporary web root, restart the isolated interpreter, and revoke Redis service-account write access.

name.zh: Redis 持久化配置写入 WebShell

description.zh: 验证暴露且高权限的 Redis 是否能通过持久化目录与文件名配置，把受控值写入 Web 可执行目录；命令操作归工具，利用条件保留为 RCE Payload。
description.en: Tests whether an exposed privileged Redis instance can use persistence directory and filename settings to write controlled data into a web-executable path; mechanics belong in tools while the exploit condition remains an RCE payload.

overview.zh: 该链路要求 Redis 连接具备 CONFIG 与持久化权限、进程对目标目录可写、Web 服务器会解释生成文件，三项缺一都不能形成 WebShell 执行
overview.en: This chain requires Redis CONFIG and persistence privileges, filesystem write access to the target directory, and a web server that interprets the generated file; without all three, no webshell execution exists

vulnerability.zh: 风险来自未授权或过度授权的 Redis 与危险文件系统边界组合，原始 RESP 数据只是传输形式；把写入成功等同于代码执行会夸大结论
vulnerability.en: The risk is the combination of unauthorized or overprivileged Redis access and a dangerous filesystem boundary; RESP data is only the transport, and a successful write alone must not be equated with code execution

exploitation.zh: 1. 在隔离容器中确认 Redis ACL、CONFIG 权限、持久化模式和目标目录写权限；2. 使用原始 RESP 载荷写入无害固定标记，禁止使用真实后门内容，并记录 SAVE/BGSAVE 与文件哈希；3. 通过测试 Web 路由判断文件是下载、文本显示还是被解释。只有固定标记进入解释路径才证明 RCE 条件；写入非 Web 目录或静态下载属于假阳性。
exploitation.en: 1. In an isolated container, verify Redis ACLs, CONFIG permission, persistence mode, and target-directory write access. 2. Use the original RESP payload with a harmless fixed marker instead of a real backdoor and record SAVE or BGSAVE plus the file hash. 3. Check through a test web route whether the file is downloaded, displayed, or interpreted. RCE conditions are proven only when the marker reaches an interpreter; writing outside the web root or static download is a false positive.

mitigation.zh: 1. Redis 仅监听受信网络并使用 ACL 禁止不需要的 CONFIG、SAVE 与模块命令；2. 以专用低权限账户运行 Redis，文件系统隔离且不可写 Web 根目录；3. 对 CONFIG SET、持久化路径变化和 Web 目录新增脚本文件告警。
mitigation.en: 1. Expose Redis only to trusted networks and use ACLs to deny unnecessary CONFIG, SAVE, and module commands. 2. Run Redis as a dedicated low-privilege account with filesystem isolation and no write access to web roots. 3. Alert on CONFIG SET, persistence-path changes, and new script files in web directories.

description.zh: 核对 Redis 权限、文件系统写权限和 Web 解释器映射，任一缺失即停止。
description.en: Check Redis privileges, filesystem write access, and web-interpreter mapping, stopping if any condition is absent.

description.zh: 在隔离环境使用原始 RESP 集合验证持久化路径，只允许固定非执行标记。
description.en: Use the original RESP set in isolation to validate the persistence path with a fixed non-executable marker only.

description.zh: 记录文件哈希和 HTTP 行为，只有解释器处理标记才进入 RCE 结论。
description.en: Record the file hash and HTTP behavior; only interpreter handling of the marker supports an RCE conclusion.

review.rationale: Redis 配置与持久化命令属于工具操作，文件进入 Web 解释路径的条件链属于 RCE Payload，应拆分保存。

prerequisites.zh: 在一次性主机或容器中分离 Redis 管理命令与 cron 消费链，记录 CONFIG 权限、服务 UID、目录和 cron 实现。
prerequisites.en: Separate Redis administration from the cron-consumption chain on a disposable host or container, recording CONFIG privileges, service UID, paths, and cron implementation.

prerequisites.zh: 使用只创建临时 canary 文件且运行一次的计划任务，预先验证 RDB 前后缀不会让 cron 解析真实命令。
prerequisites.en: Use a one-shot scheduled task that creates only a temporary canary file, first verifying how RDB prefixes and suffixes affect cron parsing.

analysis.zh: 拆分链阳性要求 Redis 审计确认测试文件落入专用 cron 目录，且调度器日志显示固定任务以预期低权限 UID 执行并生成 canary。CONFIG 返回 OK、SAVE 产生文件、cron 文件语法无效、任务未触发、网络连接来自其他进程或只有 Redis 键值都不是计划执行证据。
analysis.en: Positive evidence for the split chain requires Redis auditing to confirm a test file in the dedicated cron directory and scheduler logs to show the fixed task running once under the expected low-privilege UID and creating the canary. CONFIG returning OK, SAVE creating a file, invalid cron syntax, a task that never runs, a network connection from another process, or only a Redis value is not scheduled-execution evidence.

opsecTips.zh: 单次 canary 任务被调度后立即停止，不加入反向连接、持久循环或系统命令。
opsecTips.en: Stop immediately after the one-shot canary task is scheduled; do not add reverse connections, persistent loops, or system commands.

opsecTips.zh: 删除 cron 测试文件与 canary，恢复 Redis 持久化目录和文件名，清除测试键并重建一次性主机。
opsecTips.en: Delete the cron test file and canary, restore Redis persistence directory and filename, clear test keys, and rebuild the disposable host.

name.zh: Redis 持久化配置写入 Cron

description.zh: 验证高权限 Redis 是否能把持久化文件写入 Cron 读取位置并形成计划任务执行；Redis 命令归工具，执行条件链归 RCE/持久化 Payload。
description.en: Tests whether privileged Redis persistence can write into a cron-consumed location and create scheduled execution; Redis mechanics belong in tools while the execution chain remains an RCE or persistence payload.

overview.zh: Redis 写 Cron 依赖 CONFIG 权限、操作系统目录与格式、Redis 进程写权限、cron 服务读取规则和任务内容五个条件，不能仅凭 SAVE 成功判定命令执行
overview.en: Redis-to-cron execution depends on CONFIG permission, operating-system paths and formats, Redis process write access, cron parsing rules, and task content; a successful SAVE alone does not prove command execution

vulnerability.zh: 当 Redis 暴露且以过高系统权限运行，攻击者可能修改持久化目录和文件名，把数据库快照写入计划任务位置；不同发行版的 cron 格式会显著影响可利用性
vulnerability.en: When Redis is exposed and runs with excessive OS privileges, an attacker may change persistence paths and filenames to place a database snapshot in a scheduled-task location; cron formats vary significantly across distributions

exploitation.zh: 1. 在一次性 Linux 容器核对 Redis ACL、运行用户、cron 目录和实际解析格式；2. 用原始 RESP 载荷验证路径控制，但任务内容替换为写入临时日志的无害标记；3. 观察生成文件、cron 解析日志和标记时间线，并恢复配置。文件存在但 cron 拒绝格式、权限不足或服务未运行均为假阳性。
exploitation.en: 1. In a disposable Linux container, inspect Redis ACLs, runtime user, cron directories, and the actual parser format. 2. Use the original RESP payload to validate path control but replace task content with a harmless marker written to a temporary log. 3. Observe the generated file, cron parser logs, and marker timeline, then restore configuration. A file that cron rejects, insufficient permissions, or a stopped cron service are false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 使用 Redis ACL 禁止非管理主体调用 CONFIG 与持久化命令；2. 以不可写系统计划任务目录的专用账户运行 Redis，并启用 MAC/容器隔离；3. 监控 Redis dir/dbfilename 变化、cron 目录写入和异常计划任务。
mitigation.en: 1. Deny CONFIG and persistence commands to non-administrative Redis principals. 2. Run Redis as a dedicated account that cannot write system scheduling directories and apply MAC or container isolation. 3. Monitor Redis dir and dbfilename changes, cron-directory writes, and anomalous scheduled tasks.

description.zh: 识别发行版 cron 规则、Redis 运行用户与允许命令，避免套用错误路径。
description.en: Identify distribution-specific cron rules, the Redis runtime user, and allowed commands to avoid using an invalid path.

description.zh: 在隔离容器使用原始 RESP 命令验证配置写入，仅产生临时日志标记。
description.en: Use the original RESP commands in an isolated container to validate configuration writes with only a temporary log marker.

title.zh: 关联 cron 执行证据

description.zh: 将文件内容、cron 日志和标记时间关联，排除只写文件未被解析。
description.en: Correlate file content, cron logs, and marker timing, excluding files that were written but never parsed.

review.rationale: Redis 管理命令应迁工具，只有满足操作系统 cron 解析与权限条件的链路保留为 RCE/持久化 Payload。

prerequisites.zh: 只使用已知算法和明文的合成哈希 fixture，记录摘要长度、编码、盐、迭代次数和目标密码存储上下文。
prerequisites.en: Use only synthetic hash fixtures with known algorithms and plaintexts, recording digest length, encoding, salt, iterations, and the target password-storage context.

prerequisites.zh: 将算法名称索引与实际格式识别、配置审计和密码验证分开，不把名称列表直接作为破解命令。
prerequisites.en: Separate the algorithm-name index from format identification, configuration review, and password verification; do not treat the list as a cracking command.

analysis.zh: 阳性工具结果是某个 fixture 被正确识别并由相同参数重新计算匹配；密码存储风险还需证明应用实际使用了弱算法或缺少盐/成本。字符串长度相同、工具给出候选名称、文件中出现 md5 字样、碰撞概念或一次错误的明文猜测都不是算法确认或认证漏洞。
analysis.en: Positive tool evidence is a fixture being correctly identified and matching recomputation with the same parameters; a password-storage finding additionally requires proof that the application actually uses a weak algorithm or lacks salt or cost. Matching string length, a tool's candidate name, md5 text in a file, collision theory, or one incorrect plaintext guess is not algorithm confirmation or an authentication flaw.

opsecTips.zh: 确认一个合成 fixture 的格式与参数后停止，不导入真实用户哈希或进行大规模口令尝试。
opsecTips.en: Stop after confirming one synthetic fixture's format and parameters; do not import real user hashes or perform large-scale password attempts.

opsecTips.zh: 删除 fixture、候选明文和工具缓存，清理 shell 历史与报告附件，并恢复仅保存脱敏参数的工作区。
opsecTips.en: Delete fixtures, candidate plaintexts, and tool caches, clear shell history and report attachments, and restore a workspace containing only redacted parameters.

name.zh: 常见哈希算法标识参考

description.zh: 用于识别摘要名称和选择审计工具的算法标识清单，不包含触发认证缺陷的请求上下文，应归工具参考。
description.en: A list of digest identifiers for recognizing formats and selecting audit tools; it has no request context that triggers an authentication flaw and belongs in tool references.

overview.zh: 该内容只列出 md5、sha1、sha256、RIPEMD、Whirlpool 等算法名称，适合在哈希识别和密码存储审计时作为索引，并不是可单独发送到应用的 Payload
overview.en: This content lists identifiers such as md5, sha1, sha256, RIPEMD, and Whirlpool; it is useful as an index during hash identification and password-storage review but is not a standalone application payload

vulnerability.zh: 算法名称本身不证明密码存储薄弱，风险取决于是否使用无盐快速摘要、参数成本是否足够、密钥管理与迁移策略是否正确，必须结合实际存储格式判断
vulnerability.en: An algorithm name alone does not prove weak password storage; risk depends on unsalted fast hashes, work-factor parameters, key management, and migration policy and must be assessed against the actual stored format

exploitation.zh: 1. 从授权样本中记录摘要长度、编码、盐值和参数，不对真实用户数据离线破解；2. 使用原始算法清单缩小候选范围，再以已知测试密码验证识别结果；3. 把识别结论映射到密码存储配置与升级计划。仅凭长度猜中算法或工具返回多个候选属于假阳性。
exploitation.en: 1. Record digest length, encoding, salt, and parameters from an authorized sample without cracking real user data. 2. Use the original algorithm list to narrow candidates and verify identification with a known test password. 3. Map the confirmed format to password-storage configuration and an upgrade plan. A length-only guess or multiple tool candidates is a false positive.

mitigation.zh: 1. 密码存储使用 Argon2id、scrypt、bcrypt 或合适参数的 PBKDF2；2. 为每个密码使用独立随机盐并管理可选 pepper；3. 对旧快速摘要实施登录时渐进迁移和参数版本化。
mitigation.en: 1. Store passwords with Argon2id, scrypt, bcrypt, or appropriately configured PBKDF2. 2. Use a unique random salt for every password and manage any optional pepper securely. 3. Migrate legacy fast digests progressively at login and version work-factor parameters.

description.zh: 只记录授权测试摘要的长度、编码、盐和参数字段，不接触真实凭证。
description.en: Record only length, encoding, salt, and parameter fields from an authorized test digest without handling real credentials.

description.zh: 使用原始算法名称集合建立候选，并用已知测试密码验证唯一匹配。
description.en: Use the original algorithm-name set to build candidates and verify a unique match with a known test password.

description.zh: 根据确认算法和成本参数给出版本化升级路线，而不是把名称当作漏洞。
description.en: Create a versioned upgrade path from the confirmed algorithm and cost parameters instead of treating a name as a vulnerability.

review.rationale: 记录仅为算法名称索引，没有请求、注入点或可验证的漏洞条件。

prerequisites.zh: 使用独立攻击源和合成登录账户，在真实浏览器中确认目标响应包含无敏感 canary，并记录凭证模式和 SameSite 行为。
prerequisites.en: Use a separate attacker origin and synthetic logged-in account in a real browser, ensuring the target response contains a nonsensitive canary and recording credential mode and SameSite behavior.

prerequisites.zh: 为精确允许源、外部主机、后缀混淆、端口和特殊 Origin 建立配对，捕获请求 Origin 及全部 CORS 响应头。
prerequisites.en: Pair the exact allowed origin with external hosts, suffix confusion, ports, and special Origin values, capturing request Origin and all CORS response headers.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求不受信任 Origin 的浏览器脚本在携带合成凭证时实际读取 canary 响应，且响应头组合满足浏览器 CORS 规则。服务器返回 200、仅反射 Origin、预检通过但实际请求失败、凭证未发送、响应为公开内容或 curl 能读取都不是凭证化跨源泄露。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires browser script from an untrusted Origin to actually read the canary response while synthetic credentials are sent, with response headers satisfying browser CORS rules. HTTP 200, Origin reflection alone, successful preflight followed by failed actual request, absent credentials, public content, or curl being able to read the response is not credentialed cross-origin exposure.

opsecTips.zh: 攻击源首次读取一个无敏感 canary 后停止，不请求账户资料、token 或写接口。
opsecTips.en: Stop after the attacker origin reads one nonsensitive canary; do not request account data, tokens, or write endpoints.

opsecTips.zh: 注销测试会话，删除攻击源页面和浏览器配置文件，清除预检缓存，并恢复精确 Origin 白名单与 Vary: Origin。
opsecTips.en: Revoke the test session, delete the attacker-origin page and browser profile, clear preflight caches, and restore an exact Origin allowlist and Vary: Origin.

name.zh: Origin 校验绕过变体

description.zh: 验证 API 或认证端点是否错误信任任意、后缀混淆或特殊 Origin，从而允许跨源读取带凭证响应。
description.en: Tests whether an API or authentication endpoint trusts arbitrary, suffix-confused, or special Origin values and permits credentialed cross-origin reads.

overview.zh: Origin 头描述发起请求的源，浏览器是否允许脚本读取响应由 CORS 响应头决定；把任意域名列表称为认证注入会遗漏真正的跨源读取条件
overview.en: The Origin header identifies the requesting origin, while CORS response headers determine whether browser script may read a response; calling a domain list authentication injection misses the cross-origin read condition

vulnerability.zh: 危险实现会反射 Origin、使用不带边界的后缀正则，或在 Access-Control-Allow-Credentials 为 true 时接受攻击者源，使浏览器暴露已认证响应
vulnerability.en: A dangerous implementation reflects Origin, uses a suffix regex without label boundaries, or accepts an attacker origin while Access-Control-Allow-Credentials is true, exposing authenticated responses to browser script

exploitation.zh: 1. 从受信源和无 Origin 请求建立 CORS 基线；2. 逐个提交原始 Origin 变体并记录 ACAO、ACAC、Vary 与预检结果；3. 在不同源浏览器页面使用测试账号读取无害受保护字段。只有浏览器允许攻击者源脚本读取带凭证响应才成立；服务器返回数据但浏览器因 CORS 阻止读取是假阳性。
exploitation.en: 1. Establish CORS baselines from a trusted origin and without Origin. 2. Submit each original Origin variant and record ACAO, ACAC, Vary, and preflight behavior. 3. From another origin in a browser, use a test account to read a harmless protected field. The flaw exists only when attacker-origin script can read a credentialed response; a server response blocked by the browser is a false positive.

mitigation.zh: 1. 解析 Origin 并与完整 scheme/host/port 白名单精确匹配；2. 仅在必要端点启用凭证 CORS，动态响应时添加 Vary: Origin；3. 对 null、子域后缀、端口和 Unicode 域名建立浏览器回归测试。
mitigation.en: 1. Parse Origin and compare the complete scheme, host, and port against an exact allowlist. 2. Enable credentialed CORS only where necessary and send Vary: Origin for dynamic responses. 3. Add browser tests for null, suffix-confused subdomains, ports, and Unicode domains.

description.zh: 捕获可信源请求的 ACAO、ACAC、Vary 与预检结果。
description.en: Capture ACAO, ACAC, Vary, and preflight behavior for a trusted origin.

description.zh: 逐项使用原始域名变体，保持方法、Cookie 和请求体不变。
description.en: Use the original origin variants one at a time while preserving method, cookies, and body.

description.zh: 从攻击者源脚本读取无害受保护字段，区分服务端响应和浏览器可读性。
description.en: Read a harmless protected field from attacker-origin script and distinguish server response from browser readability.

review.rationale: 内容测试 CORS Origin 白名单而非通用认证注入，应归 API/CORS。

prerequisites.zh: 建立无权限与有权限合成主体，对同一只读 canary 资源记录有 Referer、缺失 Referer 和伪造 Referer 的授权基线。
prerequisites.en: Create unauthorized and authorized synthetic principals and record authorization baselines for the same read-only canary resource with present, absent, and forged Referer.

prerequisites.zh: 记录浏览器 Referrer-Policy、代理裁剪结果和服务端最终主体，确保测试只改变 Referer 而不改变 Cookie 或 Authorization。
prerequisites.en: Record browser Referrer-Policy, proxy trimming, and the server's final principal, ensuring only Referer changes while Cookie and Authorization remain fixed.

analysis.zh: 阳性是同一无权限主体仅因 Referer 伪装成可信页面而被服务器授予 canary 访问，授权日志显示 Referer 是决定性条件。Referer 被接收或记录、风险评分变化、重定向到登录页、缓存响应、原主体本已有权限或 CSRF token 同时有效都不是基于 Referer 的授权绕过。
analysis.en: Positive evidence is the same unauthorized principal gaining canary access solely because Referer is forged as a trusted page, with authorization logs showing Referer as the decisive condition. Referer being accepted or logged, a risk-score change, redirect to login, cached response, a principal already authorized, or a concurrently valid CSRF token is not Referer-based authorization bypass.

opsecTips.zh: 一个只读 canary 因 Referer 单独被放行后停止，不转向对象写入或其他用户资源。
opsecTips.en: Stop after one read-only canary is allowed solely because of Referer; do not move to object writes or other users' resources.

opsecTips.zh: 删除合成主体和 canary，清除代理与授权调试日志，并恢复基于会话/对象的服务端授权及 Referrer-Policy。
opsecTips.en: Delete synthetic principals and the canary, clear proxy and authorization debug logs, and restore session- and object-based server authorization and Referrer-Policy.

name.zh: Referer 访问控制绕过变体

description.zh: 验证应用是否把可缺失、可裁剪且受策略影响的 Referer 当作主要认证或授权依据。
description.en: Tests whether an application treats the optional, policy-dependent, and privacy-trimmed Referer header as a primary authentication or authorization signal.

overview.zh: Referer 会受到浏览器 Referrer-Policy、协议降级、代理和隐私设置影响，适合辅助风控而不适合单独证明请求来自可信页面
overview.en: Referer is affected by Referrer-Policy, protocol downgrade, proxies, and privacy settings; it may assist risk scoring but should not independently prove that a request came from a trusted page

vulnerability.zh: 如果服务端只做字符串包含或后缀匹配，并在 Referer 缺失时放行，攻击者可能用相似域名、路径或空头绕过页面来源检查，同时需要排除网关统一拒绝页、缓存响应和公开资源。
vulnerability.en: If the server uses substring or suffix checks and allows missing Referer, an attacker may bypass page-origin checks with lookalike domains, crafted paths, or an absent header, while excluding gateway-generated denial pages, cached responses, and public resources.

exploitation.zh: 1. 使用正常业务页面请求受保护动作并记录 Referer 与授权结果；2. 逐一替换为原始 Referer 域名和路径变体，同时保留账号及请求体；3. 再测试缺失头并核对状态变化、用户身份和审计日志。只有来源变化导致原本禁止的操作成功才成立；浏览器自动裁剪路径或错误页差异是假阳性。
exploitation.en: 1. Invoke the protected action from the normal business page and record Referer and authorization. 2. Replace Referer with each original domain and path variant while preserving account and body. 3. Test a missing header and verify state change, user identity, and audit log. The flaw exists only if a source change enables an otherwise denied action; browser path trimming or error-page differences are false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 关键操作使用服务端会话、对象级授权和 CSRF token；2. Referer 仅作辅助信号，若校验则解析完整 origin 而非子串；3. 明确处理缺失头并对来源校验分支建立测试。
mitigation.en: 1. Protect sensitive actions with server sessions, object-level authorization, and CSRF tokens. 2. Use Referer only as a secondary signal and parse its complete origin rather than matching substrings. 3. Define behavior for a missing header and test every source-validation branch.

description.zh: 从合法业务页面执行受控动作并保存 Referer 和授权日志。
description.en: Perform a controlled action from the legitimate page and save Referer and authorization logs.

description.zh: 提交原始 Referer 变体及空头对照，每次只改变来源。
description.en: Submit the original Referer variants and a missing-header control, changing only the source.

description.zh: 确认是否出现真实状态变化，并排除仅路径裁剪或错误页面不同。
description.en: Confirm an actual state change and exclude path trimming or differing error pages.

review.rationale: 该条验证错误的 Referer 信任边界，保留在认证/授权但补充 CSRF 与对象授权证据。

prerequisites.zh: 准备有效、已撤销和不存在三类合成 token，并绘制网关、框架和业务层对 Header、Cookie、JSON 字段的类型 schema。
prerequisites.en: Prepare valid, revoked, and nonexistent synthetic tokens, and map gateway, framework, and business-layer type schemas for headers, cookies, and JSON fields.

prerequisites.zh: 分别发送缺失字段、空字符串、null、布尔、数字、对象和字符串化特殊值，记录每层规范化值与最终主体。
prerequisites.en: Send missing fields, empty strings, null, booleans, numbers, objects, and stringified special values separately, recording normalized values and the final principal at each layer.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求无有效 token 的类型混淆值经过解析后映射到已认证合成主体或绕过固定 canary 的认证检查，且日志指出错误的默认值或缓存键。返回匿名内容、400/500、字符串 `null` 被记录、解析器接受 JSON、或前端认为已登录但服务端主体为空都属于假阳性。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires a type-confused value without a valid token to map to an authenticated synthetic principal or bypass authentication for a fixed canary, with logs identifying the faulty default or cache key. Anonymous content, HTTP 400 or 500, logged string null, JSON parser acceptance, or a client showing logged-in state while the server principal is empty is a false positive.

opsecTips.zh: 首个异常类型导致认证主体变化后停止，不利用该主体访问更多端点或刷新 token。
opsecTips.en: Stop after the first abnormal type changes the authenticated principal; do not use that principal on additional endpoints or refresh tokens.

opsecTips.zh: 撤销所有合成 token，清除网关/应用认证缓存和解析日志，并恢复字符串 token schema 与 fail-closed 默认值。
opsecTips.en: Revoke all synthetic tokens, clear gateway and application authentication caches and parser logs, and restore a string-token schema with fail-closed defaults.

name.zh: 空值与类型异常 Token 校验

description.zh: 验证认证中间件是否错误接受空字符串、null、布尔值、数字或对象形式的 token。
description.en: Tests whether authentication middleware incorrectly accepts empty strings, nulls, booleans, numbers, or object-shaped token values.

overview.zh: Token 删除和置空测试关注解析器、网关与业务层对缺失值和类型异常的处理是否一致，而不是假设字符串 null 本身具有认证意义
overview.en: Token deletion and null testing examines whether parsers, gateways, and business logic handle missing and type-confused values consistently rather than assuming the string null has authentication meaning

vulnerability.zh: 弱类型比较、默认值回退、JSON 类型强制或中间件短路可能把异常 token 映射到匿名高权限上下文、缓存主体或上一次请求状态
vulnerability.en: Loose comparison, default fallback, JSON coercion, or middleware short-circuiting can map malformed tokens to an anonymous privileged context, cached principal, or stale request state

exploitation.zh: 1. 分别用有效、无效和缺失 token 建立三组响应与主体日志；2. 提交原始空值、布尔、数字和对象变体，保持端点及会话不变；3. 检查解析后的 token 类型、最终主体和受保护数据。只有异常值获得已认证主体或授权结果才确认；统一错误包装、匿名公开响应或 204 均是假阳性。
exploitation.en: 1. Establish response and principal logs for valid, invalid, and absent tokens. 2. Submit the original null, boolean, numeric, and object variants while preserving endpoint and session. 3. Inspect parsed token type, final principal, and protected data. Confirm only if a malformed value yields an authenticated principal or authorization result; uniform error envelopes, anonymous public responses, and 204 responses are false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 在入口层要求 token 为非空、长度受限的字符串并拒绝其他 JSON 类型；2. 验证失败必须清除主体且默认拒绝；3. 禁止跨请求缓存身份对象并对缺失、null 和类型异常增加单元测试。
mitigation.en: 1. Require tokens to be non-empty length-bounded strings at the boundary and reject every other JSON type. 2. Clear the principal on validation failure and deny by default. 3. Do not cache identity objects across requests and add tests for absent, null, and type-confused values.

description.zh: 记录有效、无效和完全缺失 token 的主体与响应。
description.en: Record principal and response for valid, invalid, and entirely absent tokens.

description.zh: 依次使用原始空值、对象、数字与布尔 token，并捕获解析结果。
description.en: Use the original empty, object, numeric, and boolean tokens and capture parser output.

description.zh: 在授权日志中验证失败请求是否仍携带旧主体或默认高权限身份。
description.en: Verify in authorization logs whether failed requests retain a stale or privileged default principal.

review.rationale: 属于认证边界的 token 类型与缺失值处理测试，可保留为认证 Payload。

prerequisites.zh: 逐项把 none 算法、HS/RS Header、claim 样本和弱 secret 候选分类，不把混合列表作为单一 token 或攻击链执行。
prerequisites.en: Classify none algorithms, HS or RS headers, claim samples, and weak-secret candidates individually; do not execute the mixed list as one token or attack chain.

prerequisites.zh: 将 JWT 解析/签名/授权测试路由到现有 JWT 卡，将 secret 字典路由到获准的口令审计工具，并为两类使用不同 fixture。
prerequisites.en: Route JWT parsing, signature, and authorization tests to existing JWT cards and secret dictionaries to an approved password-audit tool, using separate fixtures for each.

analysis.zh: 本条拆分阳性是每个片段获得唯一类型、前置条件和既有路由，并在目标卡中用有效签名基线、无效签名对照或合成 secret 命中来判定。列表含常见词、Header 可解析、某个示例 token 返回错误、工具报告候选 secret 或多个片段可拼接都不能证明一个统一认证漏洞。
analysis.en: Positive evidence for the split is every fragment receiving one type, prerequisite set, and existing route, with the target card applying a valid-signature baseline, invalid-signature control, or synthetic-secret match. Common words in the list, a parsable header, an example token returning an error, a tool suggesting a candidate secret, or fragments being concatenable does not prove one unified authentication flaw.

opsecTips.zh: 遇到真实 secret 候选或跨类别片段时停止于分类，不对生产 token 运行字典或批量变体。
opsecTips.en: Stop at classification when encountering real-secret candidates or cross-category fragments; do not run dictionaries or bulk variants against production tokens.

opsecTips.zh: 删除临时 token、secret fixture 和未采用的拆分草稿，清除工具缓存，并保留仅含脱敏路由映射的审校记录。
opsecTips.en: Delete temporary tokens, secret fixtures, and discarded split drafts, clear tool caches, and retain only a redacted routing map in the review record.

name.zh: JWT 与认证测试混合集（待拆分）
name.en: Mixed JWT and Authentication Test Set

description.zh: 包含 JWT 头、令牌样本、弱密钥和其他认证片段的混合集；本覆盖保留审阅入口并明确需要拆到 JWT Payload 与密码工具。
description.en: A mixed set of JWT headers, token samples, weak secrets, and other authentication fragments; this override keeps a review entry and documents the required split into JWT payloads and password tools.

overview.zh: 原条目用来源名称和条数代替主题，实际混合了 none 算法、HS/RS 头、声明样本、常见密钥等不同验证目标，不能作为一个连贯攻击链直接执行
overview.en: The source-based title and count conceal several distinct goals: none algorithms, HS and RS headers, claim samples, and common secrets; the collection cannot be executed as one coherent attack chain

vulnerability.zh: 不同片段对应完全不同的根因，包括算法固定失败、签名密钥过弱、声明授权错误和解析差异；若不拆分，任何响应差异都无法映射到具体控制缺陷
vulnerability.en: The fragments map to different root causes including algorithm-pinning failure, weak signing secrets, claim-authorization mistakes, and parser differences; without splitting, a response difference cannot identify a specific failed control

exploitation.zh: 1. 先按 JWT Header、完整令牌、声明和候选密钥对原始集合分组；2. 每组只针对一个测试令牌和一个受保护端点建立有效/无效对照；3. 记录签名验证器错误、主体和授权结果，再把候选密钥移到离线工具。混合提交后获得 400、解码成功或工具识别到哈希都不能证明漏洞。
exploitation.en: 1. Split the original collection into JWT headers, complete tokens, claims, and candidate secrets. 2. For each group, use one test token and one protected endpoint with valid and invalid controls. 3. Record validator errors, principal, and authorization, then move candidate secrets to offline tooling. A 400 response, successful decoding, or hash recognition from a mixed submission does not prove a flaw.

mitigation.zh: 1. 服务端固定 JWT 算法和密钥来源并验证 issuer、audience 与时效；2. 使用高熵签名密钥和轮换机制；3. 将弱密钥字典与在线 Payload 分离，并为每种验证失败建立独立回归测试。
mitigation.en: 1. Pin JWT algorithms and key sources and validate issuer, audience, and time constraints. 2. Use high-entropy signing keys with rotation. 3. Separate weak-secret dictionaries from online payloads and maintain an independent regression test for each validation failure.

description.zh: 把原始内容分为算法、完整令牌、声明和密钥四类，禁止整组直接发送。
description.en: Divide the original content into algorithms, complete tokens, claims, and secrets and do not submit the whole set.

description.zh: 针对单一受保护端点逐组测试，并记录签名验证、主体和授权结果。
description.en: Test each group against one protected endpoint and record signature validation, principal, and authorization.

description.zh: 将弱密钥与格式识别项迁入 JWT/哈希工具，Payload 仅保留可解释的令牌变体。
description.en: Move weak secrets and format-identification items into JWT or hash tools and retain only interpretable token variants as payloads.

review.rationale: 内容混合多个 JWT 缺陷和工具字典，无法用单一教程准确描述，必须拆分。

prerequisites.zh: 固定测试 issuer、audience、算法、kid 和低权限 claims，保存一枚有效 token 作为所有单变量实验的基线。
prerequisites.en: Pin the test issuer, audience, algorithm, kid, and low-privilege claims, retaining one valid token as the baseline for every single-variable experiment.

prerequisites.zh: 按解析、算法选择、密钥验证、claim 校验和资源授权分阶段执行，每次只改变算法、key 或一个 claim。
prerequisites.en: Execute parsing, algorithm selection, key validation, claim validation, and resource authorization in stages, changing only the algorithm, key, or one claim at a time.

analysis.zh: 阳性必须定位到具体阶段：无效签名被接受、错误 key 验证通过、受众/时效未校验，或篡改 claim 改变固定资源授权，并由服务端日志确认。token 能解码、错误码不同、某个弱词恰好是测试 secret、返回匿名 200、或一次综合样本失败都不能概括为 JWT 绕过。
analysis.en: Positive evidence must identify a specific stage: an invalid signature accepted, a wrong key validated, audience or lifetime skipped, or a tampered claim changing authorization to the fixed resource, confirmed by server logs. Token decoding, different error codes, a weak word coincidentally used as a test secret, anonymous HTTP 200, or one mixed sample failing does not establish a JWT bypass.

opsecTips.zh: 任一单变量首次改变只读 canary 的认证或授权结果后停止，不继续叠加算法、密钥和 claim 变体。
opsecTips.en: Stop after any single variable first changes authentication or authorization for the read-only canary; do not stack algorithm, key, and claim variants.

opsecTips.zh: 撤销测试 token，轮换 fixture 密钥，清除 JWKS/认证缓存和阶段日志，并恢复完整验证策略。
opsecTips.en: Revoke test tokens, rotate fixture keys, clear JWKS and authentication caches and stage logs, and restore the complete validation policy.

name.zh: JWT 验证边界测试集

description.zh: 覆盖 none 算法、算法标识、常见签名密钥与声明变体，用于分阶段验证 JWT 解析、签名和授权边界。
description.en: Covers none algorithms, algorithm identifiers, common signing secrets, and claim variants for staged review of JWT parsing, signature, and authorization boundaries.

overview.zh: JWT 综合测试必须把解析成功、签名通过和授权成功区分开；原始集合可作为候选输入，但每次测试只能改变算法、密钥或声明中的一个维度
overview.en: Comprehensive JWT testing must distinguish successful parsing, signature validation, and authorization; the original set is candidate input, but each test must change only one of algorithm, key, or claim

vulnerability.zh: 当验证器接受 none、弱 HMAC 密钥或客户端控制的算法，并且业务层直接信任 role 等声明时，多个缺陷可能叠加造成身份伪造
vulnerability.en: When a verifier accepts none, weak HMAC secrets, or client-controlled algorithms and business logic trusts claims such as role directly, multiple defects can combine into impersonation

exploitation.zh: 1. 用合法测试令牌记录算法、issuer、audience、时效和权限基线；2. 将原始集合拆成算法、密钥、声明三组并逐个变量复测；3. 对每个候选记录解析、签名、主体和授权四层结果。JWT 可被解码、返回统一 401 或仅暴露不同错误均不是成功，必须访问受保护资源才确认。
exploitation.en: 1. Record algorithm, issuer, audience, time, and privilege baselines from a valid test token. 2. Split the original set into algorithm, secret, and claim groups and change one variable at a time. 3. Record parsing, signature, principal, and authorization outcomes for every candidate. Decoding a JWT, receiving a uniform 401, or seeing a different error is not success; access to a protected resource is required.

mitigation.zh: 1. 固定允许算法与密钥类型并拒绝 none；2. 使用高熵密钥、轮换和安全密钥存储；3. 完整验证标准声明并在服务端重新计算权限，为所有负向变体保留回归测试。
mitigation.en: 1. Pin allowed algorithms and key types and reject none. 2. Use high-entropy keys, rotation, and secure key storage. 3. Validate standard claims completely, recompute permissions server-side, and retain regression tests for every negative variant.

description.zh: 分别记录合法令牌的解析、签名、主体与授权结果。
description.en: Record parsing, signature, principal, and authorization results separately for a valid token.

title.en: Apply candidates one variable at a time

description.zh: 按算法、密钥和声明拆分原始集合，禁止同时更改多层。
description.en: Split the original set by algorithm, secret, and claim and never alter several layers at once.

description.zh: 将实际受保护访问与验证日志关联，确定问题发生在签名还是授权层。
description.en: Correlate protected access with validation logs to locate the failure in signature or authorization handling.

review.rationale: 这是可拆分执行的 JWT 综合测试集合，应归 JWT 安全并明确分层证据。

prerequisites.zh: 使用专用 OAuth 测试客户端、合成用户和已登记的精确回调 URI，控制所有候选域和中间重定向。
prerequisites.en: Use a dedicated OAuth test client, synthetic user, and exactly registered callback URI, controlling every candidate domain and intermediate redirect.

prerequisites.zh: 在授权请求和 token 兑换阶段记录 client_id、redirect_uri、code、state 与浏览器最终导航，使用一次性 code canary。
prerequisites.en: Record client_id, redirect_uri, code, state, and final browser navigation at authorization and token-exchange stages, using a one-time code canary.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求未登记或解析歧义的回调实际收到为测试客户端签发的授权码/令牌，并且该 code 能在预期绑定条件下兑换或被外部方利用；开放重定向链也需证明凭据离开登记源。仅跳转到错误页、外域收到无 code 请求、授权服务器返回错误、浏览器地址栏显示候选 URI 或 code 无法兑换都不是可利用 redirect_uri 缺陷。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires an unregistered or ambiguously parsed callback to actually receive a code or token issued for the test client, with that code redeemable under the affected binding or usable by the external party; an open-redirect chain must also show the credential leaving the registered origin. Redirecting to an error page, an external domain receiving no code, authorization-server rejection, a candidate URI appearing in the address bar, or an unredeemable code is not an exploitable redirect_uri flaw.

opsecTips.zh: 一个一次性 code 首次到达受控未登记回调后停止，不兑换真实账户 code 或扩展到其他客户端。
opsecTips.en: Stop after one one-time code reaches the controlled unregistered callback; do not redeem codes for real accounts or expand to other clients.

opsecTips.zh: 撤销 code 和测试会话，删除外部回调日志与 DNS/页面，清理浏览器数据，并恢复 URI 精确匹配和兑换绑定。
opsecTips.en: Revoke the code and test session, delete external callback logs and DNS or page data, clear browser data, and restore exact URI matching and exchange binding.

name.zh: OAuth redirect_uri 严格匹配测试

description.zh: 验证授权服务器是否对预注册重定向 URI 执行精确匹配，阻止外部域、解析歧义和开放重定向链窃取授权响应。
description.en: Tests whether an authorization server exactly matches registered redirect URIs and blocks external hosts, parsing ambiguities, and open-redirect chains from receiving authorization responses.

overview.zh: redirect_uri 决定授权码或令牌返回位置，是 OAuth 客户端绑定的核心；测试重点是授权请求和令牌交换阶段是否都绑定同一个预注册 URI
overview.en: redirect_uri determines where an authorization code or token is delivered and is central to OAuth client binding; both authorization and token exchange must bind the same pre-registered URI

vulnerability.zh: 前缀匹配、子串匹配、忽略端口或路径规范化差异会允许攻击者把授权响应送往控制域名，或经客户端开放重定向外带 code，还必须证明授权码或令牌最终到达攻击者控制的接收端。
vulnerability.en: Prefix or substring matching, ignored ports, and path-normalization differences can send authorization responses to an attacker-controlled origin or exfiltrate a code through a client open redirect, and the authorization code or token must demonstrably reach an attacker-controlled receiver.

exploitation.zh: 1. 用已注册 URI 完成测试客户端授权并记录 code 与回调基线；2. 逐个提交原始外域、编码、空字节和路径变体，同时保持 client_id、state 与 PKCE 不变；3. 检查浏览器最终 Location、授权服务器日志和 code 是否可在攻击者回调兑换。仅出现 302、错误页带 code 参数或客户端页面跳转不代表窃取成功。
exploitation.en: 1. Complete authorization with the registered URI for a test client and record code and callback baselines. 2. Submit the original external-host, encoded, null-byte, and path variants while preserving client_id, state, and PKCE. 3. Check the final browser Location, authorization-server log, and whether the code can be redeemed from the attacker callback. A 302, an error page containing a code parameter, or client-side navigation alone does not prove theft.

mitigation.zh: 1. 对完整 scheme、host、port、path 做预注册精确匹配；2. 授权码与 client_id、redirect_uri 和 PKCE verifier 绑定且单次使用；3. 禁止回调端点开放重定向并测试 URL 解析边界。
mitigation.en: 1. Exactly match the complete scheme, host, port, and path against pre-registered values. 2. Bind codes to client_id, redirect_uri, and the PKCE verifier and make them single-use. 3. Prohibit open redirects on callback endpoints and test URL-parsing boundaries.

description.zh: 使用注册回调记录授权码、state、PKCE 和最终 Location。
description.en: Use the registered callback and record code, state, PKCE, and final Location.

description.zh: 依次提交原始 redirect_uri 变体，保持客户端和用户会话不变。
description.en: Submit the original redirect_uri variants while preserving client and user session.
