description.zh: 从独立客户端使用捕获值访问无害资源，确认后立即撤销。
description.en: Use the captured value from an independent client on a harmless resource and revoke immediately after confirmation.

review.rationale: 修复乱码并从通用认证迁到 JWT 安全，强调真实泄露路径和 bearer 可用性。

prerequisites.zh: 为 URL、Cookie 和 Authorization Header 配置互不相同的合成 token，并记录登录前后与提权时的 token 映射。
prerequisites.en: Configure distinct synthetic tokens in URL, cookie, and Authorization header sources, recording token mapping before and after login and privilege elevation.

prerequisites.zh: 使用攻击者与受害者隔离客户端，分别验证客户端预置值、来源冲突、登录轮换和刷新流程。
prerequisites.en: Use isolated attacker and victim clients to test client-preset values, source conflicts, login rotation, and refresh flows separately.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求攻击者预置 token 在受害者认证后仍保持同值并映射到已认证合成主体，或低信任 URL token 覆盖安全 Header/Cookie，攻击者可读取固定 canary。URL 出现 `attacker_token`、应用返回新 token、旧值失效、来源冲突被拒绝、或只有前端保存该字符串都不是 token 固定。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires an attacker-preset token to retain the same value and map to the authenticated synthetic principal after victim login, or a low-trust URL token to override a secure header or cookie so the attacker reads the fixed canary. The literal attacker_token in a URL, issuance of a new token, invalidation of the old value, rejection of source conflict, or storage only in the client is not token fixation.

opsecTips.zh: 攻击者客户端首次通过固定 token 读取无敏感 canary 后停止，不刷新、委派或访问其他主体。
opsecTips.en: Stop after the attacker client first reads the nonsensitive canary with the fixed token; do not refresh, delegate, or access other principals.

opsecTips.zh: 撤销所有合成 token/session，清除 URL、Cookie、Header 和认证缓存，并恢复登录/提权轮换与唯一可信来源。
opsecTips.en: Revoke all synthetic tokens and sessions, clear URL, cookie, header, and authentication caches, and restore rotation at login or elevation and one trusted source.

name.zh: Token 固定与来源优先级测试

description.zh: 验证应用是否接受攻击者预设的 token 参数、在登录后沿用该值，或让 URL token 覆盖安全 Cookie/Authorization 凭据。
description.en: Tests whether an application accepts an attacker-preset token, retains it after login, or lets a URL token override secure cookie or Authorization credentials.

overview.zh: Token 固定要求客户端能够选择后续被认证的 token，并且服务端在身份提升时不重新签发；仅在 URL 出现 attacker_token 文本并不能证明固定
overview.en: Token fixation requires the client to choose a token that later becomes authenticated and the server to avoid reissuing it during privilege elevation; seeing attacker_token text in a URL alone does not prove fixation

vulnerability.zh: 遗留认证中间件可能从多个参数读取 token、优先采用 URL 值并把匿名 token 升级为登录状态，使攻击者预先知道受害者的最终凭据
vulnerability.en: Legacy authentication middleware may read tokens from multiple parameters, prefer the URL value, and upgrade an anonymous token into an authenticated one, leaving the attacker aware of the victim's final credential

exploitation.zh: 1. 在未认证浏览器设置一个原始固定 token，并记录服务端匿名状态；2. 使用该浏览器登录测试账号，比较登录前后 token、主体和签发记录；3. 从独立客户端重放旧 token，并测试它与安全 Cookie 冲突时的优先级。若服务端重新签发、旧值只作关联 ID 或重放被拒绝则是假阳性。
exploitation.en: 1. Set one original fixed token in an unauthenticated browser and record anonymous server state. 2. Log in with that browser and compare token, principal, and issuance records before and after. 3. Replay the old token from an independent client and test precedence against a conflicting secure cookie. Server reissuance, an old value used only as a correlation ID, or replay rejection are false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 认证成功和权限变化后签发全新 token，废弃所有匿名或旧值；2. 只从单一受信通道读取凭据并拒绝 URL token；3. token 绑定会话上下文、短时有效且支持重放检测。
mitigation.en: 1. Issue a new token after authentication and privilege changes and invalidate anonymous or previous values. 2. Read credentials from one trusted channel and reject URL tokens. 3. Bind tokens to context, keep them short-lived, and detect replay.

description.zh: 在登录前通过原始参数设置已知值并记录匿名主体。
description.en: Set a known value through the original parameters before login and record the anonymous principal.

description.zh: 登录测试账号后比较 token 是否轮换以及服务端签发记录。
description.en: After test-account login, compare token rotation and server issuance records.

attackChain.payload:
?access_token=attacker_token
?jwt=attacker_token
?bearer=attacker_token
?session_token=attacker_token
?auth_token=attacker_token
?api_token=attacker_token
?id_token=attacker_token
?refresh_token=attacker_token

description.zh: 从第二客户端使用旧 token 并制造来源冲突，确认是否继承身份。
description.en: Use the old token from a second client and create a source conflict to test identity inheritance.

review.rationale: 属于 token 生命周期和来源优先级的会话固定测试，可保留为认证 Payload。

prerequisites.zh: 从隔离签发器采集跨多个时间窗口和合成主体的 token 样本，记录毫秒时间、节点、计数器与编码。
prerequisites.en: Collect token samples from an isolated issuer across multiple time windows and synthetic principals, recording millisecond time, node, counter, and encoding.

prerequisites.zh: 预先定义训练/留出集、随机基线和在线尝试上限，在固定 canary 上验证独立预测而非回放已观察值。
prerequisites.en: Predefine training and holdout sets, a random baseline, and an online-attempt cap, validating independent predictions against a fixed canary rather than replaying observed values.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求基于时间或计数模型生成的未见候选显著优于随机基线，并成功认证到对应合成 canary，且多批样本可复现。连续数字外观、token 与时间戳长度相同、相邻样本差 1、一次 fixture 命中、已签发 token 重放或返回不同错误都不是可预测性证明。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires unseen candidates generated by a time or counter model to outperform random baseline significantly and authenticate to the corresponding synthetic canary reproducibly across batches. Sequential appearance, timestamp-like length, adjacent samples differing by one, one fixture hit, replay of an issued token, or different errors is not proof of predictability.

opsecTips.zh: 一个留出 token 被独立预测并命中 canary 后停止，不扩大时间窗口或遍历真实 token 空间。
opsecTips.en: Stop after one holdout token is independently predicted and reaches the canary; do not widen the time window or enumerate the real token space.

opsecTips.zh: 撤销样本 token，删除时间序列数据和模型缓存，清理限速状态，并恢复 CSPRNG 与足够熵。
opsecTips.en: Revoke sampled tokens, delete time-series data and model caches, clear rate-limit state, and restore CSPRNG generation with sufficient entropy.

name.zh: 时间序列弱 Token 熵检测

description.zh: 使用相邻时间戳候选验证 token 是否由可预测时间或计数器生成，并通过统计样本确认而非单次猜测。
description.en: Uses adjacent timestamp candidates to test whether tokens derive predictably from time or counters and requires statistical confirmation rather than a single guess.

overview.zh: 连续数字候选用于验证 token 是否直接采用毫秒时间戳或计数器；可靠结论需要多次签发样本、相关性分析和成功预测，不能从外观下结论
overview.en: Sequential numeric candidates test whether a token directly uses a millisecond timestamp or counter; a reliable conclusion needs multiple issued samples, correlation analysis, and a successful prediction rather than appearance alone

vulnerability.zh: 使用低熵时间值、全局递增计数器或可推导组合且缺少在线尝试限制时，攻击者可能在有限窗口内枚举有效 token，还需关联令牌生命周期、主体绑定和服务端审计事件。
vulnerability.en: Low-entropy timestamps, global counters, or derivable combinations combined with missing online attempt limits may let an attacker enumerate a valid token within a bounded window, with token lifetime, subject binding, and server-side audit events correlated.

exploitation.zh: 1. 为同一测试账号和多个并发账号收集足量 token、签发时间与服务端事件；2. 用原始相邻时间戳候选建立预测模型并在独立样本上验证；3. 仅对可撤销测试 token 做一次受控预测，并记录限速。相似长度、局部递增或一次偶然命中不够，必须在未见样本上重复预测成功。
exploitation.en: 1. Collect enough tokens, issue times, and server events for one test account and concurrent accounts. 2. Use the original adjacent timestamps to build a prediction model and validate it on held-out samples. 3. Perform one controlled prediction only against a revocable test token and record rate limiting. Similar length, local monotonicity, or one accidental hit is insufficient; prediction must repeat on unseen samples.

mitigation.zh: 1. 使用 CSPRNG 生成至少 128 位随机 token，禁止时间戳或计数器直接作为秘密；2. 设置短有效期、单次使用和账号/用途绑定；3. 限制验证频率并监控序列候选尝试。
mitigation.en: 1. Generate at least 128 bits of random token material with a CSPRNG and never use timestamps or counters directly as secrets. 2. Apply short lifetime, one-time use, and account and purpose binding. 3. Rate-limit validation and monitor sequential candidate attempts.

description.zh: 记录多账号 token 与精确签发时间，划分训练和验证样本。
description.en: Record tokens and exact issue times for several accounts and split training and validation samples.

description.zh: 使用原始连续时间戳集合验证是否存在稳定映射。
description.en: Use the original sequential timestamp set to test for a stable mapping.

description.zh: 只针对可撤销测试 token 重复验证预测，并记录限速行为。
description.en: Repeat prediction only against a revocable held-out test token and record rate-limit behavior.

review.rationale: 内容是 token 熵检测候选，保留在认证并补充统计验证标准。

prerequisites.zh: 使用只含合成用户和角色的测试签发器，记录 token 解码后的 schema、是否存在 MAC/签名以及服务端状态映射。
prerequisites.en: Use a test issuer containing only synthetic users and roles, recording the decoded token schema, presence of a MAC or signature, and server-side state mapping.

prerequisites.zh: 保留有效低权限 token 基线，只修改解码后的 username、role 或组合字段，再重新 Base64 编码并追踪授权结果。
prerequisites.en: Retain a valid low-privilege token baseline, modify only a decoded username, role, or combined field, then re-encode it with Base64 and trace authorization results.

analysis.zh: 阳性是没有完整性保护的修改内容被服务器信任，使合成主体或权限改变并访问固定 canary，认证日志显示直接采用了解码字段。能 Base64 解码、明文包含 admin/password、格式错误、token 被拒绝、前端显示修改值或服务端仍查表验证均不是 token 完整性漏洞。
analysis.en: Positive evidence is modified content without integrity protection being trusted by the server, changing the synthetic principal or privilege and reaching the fixed canary, with authentication logs showing direct use of decoded fields. Base64 decoding, plaintext containing admin or password, format errors, token rejection, client-side display changes, or server-side database verification is not a token-integrity flaw.

opsecTips.zh: 一个修改字段首次改变固定 canary 的主体/权限后停止，不组合用户名、密码和角色继续提权。
opsecTips.en: Stop after one modified field first changes the principal or privilege at the fixed canary; do not combine username, password, and role changes for further elevation.

opsecTips.zh: 撤销合成 token 和账户，清除解码/认证缓存与日志，并恢复带 MAC/签名的不可篡改 token 或服务端随机引用。
opsecTips.en: Revoke synthetic tokens and accounts, clear decoding and authentication caches and logs, and restore MAC- or signature-protected tokens or random server-side references.

name.zh: 可逆 Base64 Token 内容测试

description.zh: 验证应用是否把可逆 Base64 编码的用户名、密码或角色直接当作认证 token，而没有签名、MAC 或服务端状态验证。
description.en: Tests whether an application treats reversible Base64-encoded usernames, passwords, or roles as authentication tokens without a signature, MAC, or server-side state.

overview.zh: Base64 只是编码而非加密或完整性保护；风险在于服务端解码后直接信任内容，而不是 token 字符串看起来像 Base64
overview.en: Base64 is encoding rather than encryption or integrity protection; the risk is server trust in decoded content, not merely a token string that looks Base64 encoded

vulnerability.zh: 若 token 仅由可预测字段 Base64 编码，且缺少签名、随机会话映射或过期校验，攻击者可以解码、修改并重新编码身份数据
vulnerability.en: If a token is only Base64 over predictable fields and lacks a signature, random server-side session mapping, or expiry validation, an attacker can decode, modify, and re-encode identity data

exploitation.zh: 1. 获取低权限测试 token，确认其是否能稳定 Base64 解码并识别字段边界；2. 使用原始候选值替换单个无害字段后重新编码并提交；3. 核对服务端主体、完整性校验日志和授权结果。能解码字符串、出现可读词或服务端返回格式错误都不是漏洞，必须证明修改内容被信任。
exploitation.en: 1. Obtain a low-privilege test token and determine whether it decodes consistently as Base64 with recognizable field boundaries. 2. Replace one harmless field using the original candidate values, re-encode, and submit. 3. Verify server principal, integrity-validation logs, and authorization. Decoding text, seeing readable words, or receiving a format error is not a flaw; modified content must be trusted.

mitigation.zh: 1. 使用随机服务端会话 ID 或经过认证的签名 token，不把 Base64 当安全控制；2. 验证签名、issuer、audience、时效并在服务端执行授权；3. 对解码失败和内容篡改统一拒绝并建立负向测试。
mitigation.en: 1. Use random server-side session IDs or authenticated signed tokens and never treat Base64 as a security control. 2. Validate signature, issuer, audience, and time and authorize server-side. 3. Reject decode failures and content tampering uniformly and add negative tests.

description.zh: 对低权限测试 token 解码并记录字段边界，不使用真实凭据。
description.en: Decode a low-privilege test token and record field boundaries without using real credentials.

description.zh: 使用原始 Base64 候选替换一个无害字段后重新编码。
description.en: Use the original Base64 candidates to replace one harmless field and re-encode.

token=YWRtaW4=

token=MDAwMDAw

description.zh: 检查服务端是否拒绝篡改并避免把解析成功当认证成功。
description.en: Check that the server rejects tampering and does not equate parsing success with authentication success.

review.rationale: 属于 token 完整性与错误使用编码的认证测试，不是编码工具本身。

prerequisites.zh: 部署受控攻击 Origin 和真实浏览器测试配置，使用合成登录 Cookie 访问只含唯一 canary 的敏感型响应。
prerequisites.en: Deploy a controlled attacker Origin and real-browser test profile, using a synthetic login cookie against a sensitive-shaped response containing only a unique canary.

prerequisites.zh: 对多个任意 Origin 与已登记 Origin 发送带/不带 credentials 的请求，采集 ACAO、ACAC、Vary 与预检缓存。
prerequisites.en: Send credentialed and uncredentialed requests from multiple arbitrary and registered Origins, collecting ACAO, ACAC, Vary, and preflight-cache state.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求服务器动态反射任意攻击 Origin，同时允许凭证，且该 Origin 的浏览器脚本实际读取合成 canary。仅 Header 中回显 Origin、ACAC 缺失、通配符与 credentials 被浏览器阻止、公开响应、预检成功但实际读取失败或 curl 可见正文都属于假阳性。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires the server to dynamically reflect an arbitrary attacker Origin, permit credentials, and allow browser script at that Origin to read the synthetic canary. Origin reflection in a header alone, missing ACAC, browser rejection of wildcard with credentials, public responses, successful preflight without actual readability, or curl-visible content is a false positive.

opsecTips.zh: 任意 Origin 首次读取一个 canary 后停止，不请求实际账户数据、Authorization Header 或写操作。
opsecTips.en: Stop after an arbitrary Origin first reads one canary; do not request actual account data, Authorization headers, or write operations.

opsecTips.zh: 注销合成会话，删除攻击源和浏览器 profile，清除 CORS 缓存/日志，并恢复精确白名单、ACAC 策略和 Vary。
opsecTips.en: Revoke the synthetic session, delete the attacker origin and browser profile, clear CORS caches and logs, and restore exact allowlisting, ACAC policy, and Vary.

name.zh: 任意 Origin 反射验证

description.zh: 验证服务端是否把请求 Origin 原样写入 Access-Control-Allow-Origin，并在带凭证响应上允许任意站点读取。
description.en: Tests whether the server reflects request Origin into Access-Control-Allow-Origin and permits arbitrary sites to read credentialed responses.

overview.zh: 反射 Origin 只有与浏览器 CORS 决策、凭证模式和敏感响应组合时才有影响；单纯在响应头看到输入字符串不能直接定为漏洞
overview.en: Origin reflection has impact only together with browser CORS enforcement, credential mode, and a sensitive response; merely seeing the input string in a response header is not sufficient

vulnerability.zh: 动态 CORS 中间件若无白名单地回显任意 Origin，并同时发送 Access-Control-Allow-Credentials: true，攻击者页面可以读取受害者会话响应
vulnerability.en: If dynamic CORS middleware echoes arbitrary Origin without an allowlist and also sends Access-Control-Allow-Credentials: true, attacker-origin script can read responses from the victim session

exploitation.zh: 1. 用可信源建立 ACAO/ACAC/Vary 与预检基线；2. 逐项提交原始攻击者 Origin，并在真实浏览器以 credentials: include 请求无害受保护字段；3. 从接收脚本读取响应并关联服务端用户。只有浏览器成功向攻击者脚本暴露带凭证数据才成立；通配符配凭证被浏览器阻止或无敏感数据是假阳性（误报）。
exploitation.en: 1. Establish ACAO, ACAC, Vary, and preflight baselines from a trusted origin. 2. Submit each original attacker Origin and request a harmless protected field in a real browser with credentials included. 3. Read the response in attacker script and correlate the server user. Confirm only when the browser exposes credentialed data to attacker script; wildcard with credentials blocked by the browser or nonsensitive data are false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 对完整 origin 进行精确白名单匹配，不直接反射请求头；2. 仅在必要端点启用 credentials，并发送 Vary: Origin；3. 对随机域、端口、scheme 与 null 建立浏览器测试。
mitigation.en: 1. Match the complete origin against an exact allowlist and do not reflect the request header directly. 2. Enable credentials only where necessary and send Vary: Origin. 3. Add browser tests for random hosts, ports, schemes, and null.

title.zh: 记录可信 CORS 基线

description.zh: 保存可信源的 ACAO、ACAC、Vary 与预检行为。
description.en: Save ACAO, ACAC, Vary, and preflight behavior for a trusted origin.

description.zh: 使用原始攻击者域名逐项测试并保持请求凭据不变。
description.en: Test the original attacker domains one at a time while preserving request credentials.

http://attacker.com
https://malicious.com

title.en: Read the response in a browser

description.zh: 从攻击者源脚本读取无害受保护字段，确认真实跨源暴露。
description.en: Read a harmless protected field from attacker-origin script to confirm real cross-origin exposure.

review.rationale: 修复乱码并改归 API/CORS；必须以浏览器可读带凭证响应作为证据。

prerequisites.zh: 在真实浏览器中创建 sandboxed iframe、file 或其他受控不透明源，并验证请求确实携带 `Origin: null`。
prerequisites.en: Create a controlled opaque origin using a sandboxed iframe, file, or equivalent in a real browser, verifying that the request actually carries Origin: null.

prerequisites.zh: 使用合成凭证和无敏感 canary 响应，记录 Cookie 发送条件、ACAO/ACAC、sandbox flags 与浏览器可读结果。
prerequisites.en: Use synthetic credentials and a nonsensitive canary response, recording cookie-send conditions, ACAO and ACAC, sandbox flags, and browser-readable outcome.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求可由攻击者构造的不透明源以 `Origin: null` 携带合成凭证，并在浏览器中读取受保护 canary。服务器接受字符串 null、端口后缀变体、返回 ACAO:null 但无凭证、sandbox 禁止请求、响应为公开内容或 curl 读取均不是可利用 null Origin 信任。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires an attacker-constructible opaque origin to send synthetic credentials with Origin: null and read the protected canary in a browser. Server acceptance of the string null, port-suffixed variants, ACAO:null without credentials, a sandbox that blocks the request, public content, or curl access is not exploitable null-Origin trust.

opsecTips.zh: 不透明源首次读取 canary 后停止，不放宽 sandbox 或加载真实用户页面。
opsecTips.en: Stop after the opaque origin first reads the canary; do not relax the sandbox or load real-user pages.

opsecTips.zh: 销毁 iframe/file fixture 和浏览器 profile，注销会话、清除预检缓存，并从 CORS 白名单移除 null。
opsecTips.en: Destroy iframe or file fixtures and the browser profile, revoke the session, clear preflight caches, and remove null from the CORS allowlist.

name.zh: CORS null Origin 信任测试

description.zh: 验证服务端是否允许 Origin: null 读取带凭证敏感响应，并确认该 null 源能从 sandbox、file 或不透明源场景真实产生。
description.en: Tests whether the server lets Origin: null read credentialed sensitive responses and whether that null origin is reachable from sandboxed, file, or opaque-origin contexts.

overview.zh: null Origin 会由 sandbox iframe、file URL 和其他不透明源产生，它不是普通域名；允许 null 可能扩大跨源读取面，但还需证明攻击者能构造可用浏览器上下文
overview.en: A null Origin is produced by sandboxed iframes, file URLs, and other opaque origins and is not a normal hostname; allowing it can widen cross-origin access but requires a reachable browser context

vulnerability.zh: 若 CORS 白名单把字符串 null 当作可信源并允许 credentials，攻击者可能在 sandbox 或本地文件上下文中读取受害者会话数据
vulnerability.en: If a CORS allowlist treats the literal null as trusted and permits credentials, an attacker may read victim-session data from a sandbox or local-file context

exploitation.zh: 1. 记录可信源与普通攻击者源的 CORS 基线；2. 在 sandbox iframe 或其他可控不透明源发送原始 null 变体并携带测试会话；3. 检查浏览器是否允许脚本读取受保护字段。仅手工伪造 Origin: null 获得服务器响应、或浏览器不发送凭据时是假阳性。
exploitation.en: 1. Record CORS baselines for trusted and ordinary attacker origins. 2. From a sandboxed iframe or another controlled opaque origin, send the original null variants with a test session. 3. Check whether browser script can read a protected field. A raw client that forges Origin: null and receives a server response, or a browser that sends no credentials, is a false positive.

mitigation.zh: 1. 除非有明确且经过威胁建模的场景，否则拒绝 null Origin；2. 不对 null 响应启用 credentials，并按完整 origin 白名单；3. 用 sandbox/file 场景做浏览器回归测试。
mitigation.en: 1. Reject null Origin unless a specific threat-modeled use case requires it. 2. Do not enable credentials for null and use complete-origin allowlists. 3. Add browser regression tests with sandbox and file contexts.

description.zh: 记录可信源和普通攻击者源的浏览器 CORS 行为。
description.en: Record browser CORS behavior for trusted and ordinary attacker origins.

description.zh: 在 sandbox 上下文使用原始 null 变体发起带测试会话请求。
description.en: Use the original null variants from a sandboxed context with a test-session request.

attackChain.payload:
null:443
null:80
null:8080

description.zh: 确认脚本能否读取受保护字段，排除仅原始客户端伪造头。
description.en: Confirm whether script can read a protected field, excluding raw-client header forgery.

review.rationale: 属于 CORS null Origin 白名单问题，应归 API 安全并要求真实不透明源可达性。

prerequisites.zh: 建立目标组织子域资产清单和信任分级，明确哪些子域可由用户内容、第三方 SaaS 或测试团队控制。
prerequisites.en: Build a target-organization subdomain inventory and trust classification, identifying user-content, third-party SaaS, and test-team-controlled subdomains.

prerequisites.zh: 仅从受控低信任子域与外部相似域运行真实浏览器请求，使用合成凭证和固定 canary 记录 CORS 结果。
prerequisites.en: Run real-browser requests only from controlled low-trust subdomains and external lookalikes, using synthetic credentials and a fixed canary to record CORS outcomes.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求攻击者实际可控的低信任子域被 allowlist 接受，并能在浏览器中凭合成会话读取受保护 canary；这证明信任边界与子域治理不一致。仅允许公司自管子域、DNS 名称存在、候选字符串被反射、未接管的悬空记录、外观相似域被拒绝或公开响应均是假阳性。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires an attacker-controlled low-trust subdomain to be accepted by the allowlist and read the protected canary in a browser with a synthetic session, proving misalignment between trust boundary and subdomain governance. An allowed company-managed subdomain, an existing DNS name, reflected candidate text, an unclaimed dangling record, rejected lookalike domains, or public responses are false positives.

opsecTips.zh: 一个受控低信任子域首次读取 canary 后停止，不接管非测试 DNS 或探测其他组织资产。
opsecTips.en: Stop after one controlled low-trust subdomain first reads the canary; do not claim non-test DNS or probe other organizational assets.

opsecTips.zh: 注销会话，删除测试子域内容和 DNS，清除浏览器/CORS 缓存，并把白名单收敛到精确高信任源。
opsecTips.en: Revoke the session, delete test-subdomain content and DNS, clear browser and CORS caches, and narrow the allowlist to exact high-trust origins.

name.zh: CORS 子域信任边界测试

description.zh: 验证 CORS 白名单是否把所有子域或相似后缀一并信任，并结合子域控制权判断是否可跨源读取敏感响应。
description.en: Tests whether a CORS allowlist trusts every subdomain or lookalike suffix and combines that result with actual subdomain control to assess cross-origin data exposure.

overview.zh: 允许 *.target.com 可能是业务需要，也可能把已接管、用户内容或低信任子域提升为可信源；安全判断必须同时核对域名边界和子域治理
overview.en: Allowing every target.com subdomain may be a business requirement or may promote a taken-over, user-content, or low-trust subdomain to a trusted origin; assessment must include hostname boundaries and subdomain governance

vulnerability.zh: 无边界后缀匹配会接受 evil-target.com 等相似域，而通配子域策略会在任一子域可被攻击者控制时暴露带凭证 API
vulnerability.en: Suffix matching without label boundaries accepts lookalikes such as evil-target.com, while wildcard subdomain policy exposes credentialed APIs whenever any trusted subdomain is attacker-controlled

exploitation.zh: 1. 导出允许的业务源和子域所有权清单；2. 逐项提交原始相似域与真实子域 Origin，记录 ACAO/ACAC/Vary；3. 仅在可控低信任子域的浏览器页面读取无害受保护字段。合法受管子域被允许、相似域被拒绝或无子域控制权时不能认定可利用。
exploitation.en: 1. Export allowed business origins and subdomain ownership. 2. Submit the original lookalike and real-subdomain origins and record ACAO, ACAC, and Vary. 3. Read a harmless protected field only from a controllable low-trust subdomain in a browser. An allowed managed subdomain, a rejected lookalike, or no subdomain control does not prove exploitation.

mitigation.zh: 1. 使用完整 origin 精确列表，避免裸后缀和无界通配；2. 将用户内容、预览、开发和第三方托管子域排除出凭证 CORS；3. 持续盘点子域所有权并对 DNS 接管与 CORS 组合测试。
mitigation.en: 1. Use an exact list of complete origins and avoid bare suffixes and unbounded wildcards. 2. Exclude user-content, preview, development, and third-party-hosted subdomains from credentialed CORS. 3. Continuously inventory ownership and test subdomain takeover together with CORS.

description.zh: 区分核心业务、用户内容、开发和第三方托管子域的控制权。
description.en: Separate control of core business, user-content, development, and third-party-hosted subdomains.

description.zh: 使用原始真实子域与相似后缀集合，记录服务器白名单决策。
description.en: Use the original real-subdomain and lookalike-suffix set and record allowlist decisions.

attackChain.payload:
https://evil-target.com
https://subdomain.target.com
https://anything.target.com
https://test.target.com
https://dev.target.com
https://staging.target.com
https://admin.target.com
https://api.target.com
https://cdn.target.com
https://static.target.com
https://assets.target.com
https://media.target.com
https://files.target.com
https://images.target.com
https://upload.target.com
https://download.target.com

description.zh: 仅在已授权可控子域用浏览器验证带凭证敏感响应是否可读。
description.en: Use a browser only from an authorized controllable subdomain to verify credentialed sensitive-response readability.

review.rationale: 修正 `--ext` 模糊 ID 对应的真实主题，归入 API/CORS 子域信任边界。

prerequisites.zh: 控制测试域中的目标字符串前缀、后缀和连字符变体，并确认其 DNS/TLS 与真实目标完全独立。
prerequisites.en: Control test domains containing target-name prefixes, suffixes, and hyphen variants, confirming their DNS and TLS are fully separate from the real target.

prerequisites.zh: 记录服务端原始 Origin、URL 解析后的 scheme/host/port、正则匹配结果和浏览器 ACAO/ACAC 可读性。
prerequisites.en: Record raw Origin, parsed scheme, host, and port, regex match result, and browser readability under ACAO and ACAC.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求一个 DNS 上属于攻击者的 lookalike Origin 因未锚定、点未转义或缺少标签边界而被接受，并在浏览器中读取合成 canary。字符串包含 target.com、服务器返回 200、正则单元测试匹配、Origin 被反射但无凭证或浏览器阻止响应都不是可利用 CORS 正则绕过。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires an attacker-owned DNS lookalike Origin to be accepted because of missing anchors, unescaped dots, or absent label boundaries and to read the synthetic canary in a browser. Containing target.com as text, HTTP 200, a regex unit-test match, Origin reflection without credentials, or browser-blocked responses is not an exploitable CORS regex bypass.

opsecTips.zh: 首个 lookalike 域读取 canary 后停止，不注册额外相似域或请求真实敏感端点。
opsecTips.en: Stop after the first lookalike domain reads the canary; do not register additional lookalikes or request real sensitive endpoints.

opsecTips.zh: 注销测试会话，删除测试 DNS/证书和页面，清除 CORS 缓存，并恢复 URL 解析后精确主机比较。
opsecTips.en: Revoke the test session, delete test DNS, certificates, and pages, clear CORS caches, and restore exact host comparison after URL parsing.

name.zh: CORS 域名正则边界绕过

description.zh: 验证 Origin 白名单正则是否缺少锚点、点号转义或 DNS label 边界，从而接受 target.com.attacker.com、target-com.evil.com 等相似域。
description.en: Tests whether an Origin allowlist regex lacks anchors, escaped dots, or DNS-label boundaries and accepts lookalikes such as target.com.attacker.com or target-com.evil.com.

overview.zh: 域名正则常因 `.` 未转义、缺少起止锚点或只检查包含 target 字符串而越界；应在 URL 解析后比较 host，而不是直接对原始 Origin 文本做宽松正则
overview.en: Hostname regexes often fail because dots are unescaped, anchors are missing, or only the target substring is checked; validation should parse the URL and compare the host rather than apply a loose regex to raw Origin text

vulnerability.zh: 错误表达式可能把攻击者注册的父域、后缀或连字符变体当成可信源，并在允许 credentials 时向其暴露受保护 API
vulnerability.en: A faulty expression may treat attacker-registered parent domains, suffixes, or hyphen variants as trusted origins and expose protected APIs when credentials are allowed

exploitation.zh: 1. 获取测试环境 CORS 允许源预期并记录合法 target.com 源基线；2. 逐项提交原始相似域，核对解析后的 scheme/host/port 与 ACAO；3. 从实际控制的测试域用浏览器读取无害受保护字段。只看到头反射、无法控制域名或浏览器阻止读取均是假阳性。
exploitation.en: 1. Obtain expected CORS origins for the test environment and record a valid target.com baseline. 2. Submit each original lookalike, comparing parsed scheme, host, and port with ACAO. 3. From an actually controlled test domain, use a browser to read a harmless protected field. Header reflection alone, no domain control, or browser-blocked reads are false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 使用标准 URL 解析器并精确比较 scheme、host、port；2. 若必须使用正则，转义点号、添加完整锚点和 DNS label 边界并代码审查；3. 为父域、后缀、连字符和 Unicode 变体建立测试。
mitigation.en: 1. Use a standard URL parser and exactly compare scheme, host, and port. 2. If regex is unavoidable, escape dots, add full anchors and DNS-label boundaries, and review the expression. 3. Test parent-domain, suffix, hyphen, and Unicode variants.

description.zh: 保存合法 Origin 的解析组件和 CORS 响应。
description.en: Save parsed components and CORS response for a legitimate Origin.

description.zh: 使用原始相似域集合并比较服务器解析及 ACAO 决策。
description.en: Use the original lookalike set and compare server parsing and ACAO decisions.

attackChain.payload:
https://target.com.attacker.com
https://target-com.evil.com
https://targetcom.evil.com

description.zh: 从授权控制域的浏览器读取无害字段，确认错误信任具有影响。
description.en: Read a harmless field from a browser on an authorized controlled domain to confirm impact.

review.rationale: 属于 CORS hostname 正则校验缺陷，应归 API 安全。

prerequisites.zh: 从受控攻击 Origin 使用真实浏览器发送请求，构造 Origin 与 Referer 一致、冲突、Referer 缺失和被策略裁剪的组合。
prerequisites.en: Send requests from a controlled attacker Origin in a real browser, constructing combinations where Origin and Referer agree, conflict, Referer is absent, or policy-trimmed.

prerequisites.zh: 使用合成凭证和 canary 响应，记录浏览器实际发送的两个 Header、服务端选择信号及完整 CORS 响应头。
prerequisites.en: Use synthetic credentials and a canary response, recording both headers actually sent by the browser, the server's selected signal, and complete CORS response headers.

analysis.zh: 阳性是服务端忽略不可信 Origin，因伪造/可信 Referer 而返回允许攻击源读取的 CORS 头，浏览器最终读到受保护 canary。Referer 改变风控、请求到达但响应不可读、无 credentials、Origin 本身已允许、curl 可伪造两头或 Referrer-Policy 导致缺失都不是组合绕过。
analysis.en: Positive evidence is the server ignoring an untrusted Origin and returning CORS headers that let the attacker origin read the protected canary because of a forged or trusted Referer. A Referer-driven risk-score change, delivered but unreadable response, absent credentials, an Origin already allowed, curl forging both headers, or Referer absence due to policy is not a combined bypass.

opsecTips.zh: 一个 Header 冲突组合首次让浏览器读取 canary 后停止，不增加跨站状态变更请求。
opsecTips.en: Stop after one conflicting-header combination first lets the browser read the canary; do not add cross-site state-changing requests.

opsecTips.zh: 注销会话，删除攻击页面和浏览器数据，清除预检/代理缓存，并恢复只依据 Origin 的精确 CORS 决策。
opsecTips.en: Revoke the session, delete attacker pages and browser data, clear preflight and proxy caches, and restore exact CORS decisions based only on Origin.

name.zh: CORS 与 Referer 校验组合测试
name.en: Combined CORS and Referer Validation Test

description.zh: 验证服务端是否错误地用 Referer 代替 Origin 决定 CORS，或两个来源信号不一致时进入放行分支。
description.en: Tests whether a server incorrectly uses Referer instead of Origin for CORS decisions or allows requests when the two source signals disagree.

overview.zh: CORS 的浏览器安全决策基于 Origin 和响应头，Referer 只能提供可选导航信息；混用二者会受到 Referrer-Policy、代理裁剪和来源冲突影响
overview.en: Browser CORS decisions depend on Origin and response headers, while Referer is optional navigation information; mixing them creates errors under Referrer-Policy, proxy trimming, and source conflicts

vulnerability.zh: 应用若在 Origin 不可信时回退检查 Referer，或只要任一头匹配就放行，攻击者可构造冲突值绕过 CORS 白名单或来源校验
vulnerability.en: If an application falls back to Referer when Origin is untrusted or allows a request when either header matches, conflicting values may bypass CORS allowlists or source validation

exploitation.zh: 1. 从合法浏览器源记录 Origin、Referer 和 CORS 响应基线；2. 使用原始 Referer 变体，分别配对可信、不可信和缺失 Origin；3. 在攻击者源浏览器读取无害受保护字段并查看服务端分支日志。原始 HTTP 客户端可任意设置两头、浏览器无法产生该组合或响应不可读时是假阳性。
exploitation.en: 1. Record Origin, Referer, and CORS response from a legitimate browser origin. 2. Pair the original Referer variants with trusted, untrusted, and missing Origin values. 3. From an attacker-origin browser, read a harmless protected field and inspect server branch logs. A raw client that can set both headers arbitrarily, a combination browsers cannot produce, or an unreadable response is a false positive.

mitigation.zh: 1. CORS 仅依据解析后的 Origin 精确白名单，不以 Referer 回退；2. 来源冲突默认拒绝并记录，Referer 仅作辅助风控；3. 用真实浏览器覆盖缺失、裁剪和冲突头组合。
mitigation.en: 1. Base CORS only on an exact parsed-Origin allowlist and never fall back to Referer. 2. Deny and log source conflicts by default and use Referer only as a secondary risk signal. 3. Cover missing, trimmed, and conflicting headers with real-browser tests.

description.zh: 记录合法页面产生的 Origin、Referer 与预检序列。
description.en: Record Origin, Referer, and preflight sequence from a legitimate page.

description.zh: 将原始 Referer 值与不同 Origin 组合，并确认浏览器可真实产生。
description.en: Pair the original Referer values with different Origins and confirm a real browser can produce the combination.

attackChain.payload:
Referer: https://evil.com/path
Referer: https://evil.com:443/
Referer: https://evil.com:8080/

description.zh: 从不可信源脚本读取受保护字段并关联服务端校验分支。
description.en: Read a protected field from untrusted-origin script and correlate the server validation branch.

review.rationale: 内容测试 CORS/Referer 混用，应从认证迁到 API/CORS 并要求浏览器可达组合。

prerequisites.zh: 使用受控跨站页面和合成账户，选择只改变可回滚 canary 的 API，并记录 Cookie SameSite 与 CSRF 控制。
prerequisites.en: Use a controlled cross-site page and synthetic account, selecting an API that changes only a reversible canary and recording cookie SameSite and CSRF controls.

prerequisites.zh: 分别以三种 simple Content-Type 和需要预检的 JSON 发送语义相同请求，采集 OPTIONS、实际请求、认证和状态变化。
prerequisites.en: Send semantically identical requests with the three simple Content-Types and preflighted JSON separately, collecting OPTIONS, actual request, authentication, and state change.

analysis.zh: 阳性必须区分两类影响：simple request 未经预检仍携带凭证并改变 canary，或攻击源还能通过正确 CORS 头读取敏感型响应。没有 OPTIONS、POST 到达、返回 opaque response、浏览器不能读取、服务器因 CSRF token 拒绝、Cookie 未发送或仅解析失败都不是认证绕过。
analysis.en: Positive evidence must distinguish two impacts: a simple request carries credentials and changes the canary without preflight, or the attacker origin additionally reads a sensitive-shaped response through valid CORS headers. No OPTIONS, POST delivery, an opaque response, browser unreadability, CSRF-token rejection, absent cookies, or parse failure is not authentication bypass.

opsecTips.zh: 一个 simple request 首次改变可逆 canary 或读取一次响应后停止，不测试转账、删除或权限变更。
opsecTips.en: Stop after one simple request first changes the reversible canary or reads one response; do not test transfers, deletion, or privilege changes.

opsecTips.zh: 回滚 canary，注销会话，删除跨站页面和浏览器 profile，清除预检缓存，并恢复 CSRF 与内容类型校验。
opsecTips.en: Roll back the canary, revoke the session, delete the cross-site page and browser profile, clear preflight caches, and restore CSRF and content-type validation.

name.zh: CORS 简单请求与预检边界测试
name.en: CORS Simple-Request and Preflight Boundary Test

description.zh: 验证仅保护预检路径的 API 是否仍会接受 text/plain、表单等简单跨源请求，并区分请求发送与响应可读两种影响。
description.en: Tests whether APIs protected only at preflight still accept simple cross-origin requests using text/plain or form encodings and distinguishes request delivery from response readability.

overview.zh: application/x-www-form-urlencoded、multipart/form-data 和 text/plain 在满足条件时可形成 CORS 简单请求而不先发送 OPTIONS；这不会自动绕过服务端认证或 CSRF 防护
overview.en: application/x-www-form-urlencoded, multipart/form-data, and text/plain can qualify as CORS simple requests without a preceding OPTIONS request, but this does not automatically bypass server authentication or CSRF protection

vulnerability.zh: 如果服务端把 OPTIONS 预检当作唯一安全控制，却在实际端点接受简单 Content-Type 并使用 Cookie 执行状态变化，攻击者可跨站触发请求；若同时错误开放 CORS，还可能读取响应
vulnerability.en: If a server treats OPTIONS preflight as its only control while the actual endpoint accepts simple content types and uses cookies for state changes, an attacker can trigger cross-site requests; misconfigured CORS may additionally expose the response

exploitation.zh: 1. 用正常 JSON 请求记录预检、认证、CSRF 与状态变化基线；2. 逐项使用原始简单 Content-Type 重放等价业务请求，保持字段语义一致；3. 分别验证请求是否改变状态以及攻击者脚本是否能读取响应。未预检但被 CSRF token/Origin 阻止、仅发送无状态请求或响应不可读不能等同为完整 CORS 绕过。
exploitation.en: 1. Record preflight, authentication, CSRF, and state-change baselines for a normal JSON request. 2. Replay the equivalent business request with each original simple Content-Type while preserving field semantics. 3. Separately verify state change and attacker-script response readability. No preflight with CSRF or Origin rejection, a stateless delivered request, or an unreadable response is not a complete CORS bypass.

mitigation.zh: 1. 在实际业务端点验证认证、对象授权、CSRF token 和 Origin，而不是依赖预检；2. 仅接受业务需要的 Content-Type 并严格解析 schema；3. 配置精确 CORS 白名单并测试简单请求、预检请求及带凭证读取。
mitigation.en: 1. Enforce authentication, object authorization, CSRF tokens, and Origin on the actual endpoint rather than relying on preflight. 2. Accept only required content types and parse a strict schema. 3. Configure an exact CORS allowlist and test simple requests, preflighted requests, and credentialed reads.

title.zh: 记录 JSON 预检基线

description.zh: 捕获正常 JSON 请求的 OPTIONS、实际请求和状态变化。
description.en: Capture OPTIONS, the actual request, and state change for normal JSON.

description.zh: 使用原始三类 Content-Type 重放语义相同的测试请求。
description.en: Replay the semantically equivalent test request with the original three content types.

attackChain.payload:
Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded
Content-Type: multipart/form-data
Content-Type: text/plain

description.zh: 分别确认是否改变状态、是否携带凭据和攻击者脚本能否读取响应。
description.en: Verify state change, credential attachment, and attacker-script readability separately.

review.rationale: 这是 API 的 CORS 简单请求/预检边界测试，不是一般认证绕过。
